FIX_Tags_Description.description: The coupon payment date for a **leg** in a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegIssueDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The issue date for a **leg** in a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegRepoCollateralSecurityType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The type of collateral used for a **leg** in a repurchase agreement (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegRepurchaseTerm
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The repurchase term for a **leg** (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegRepurchaseRate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The repurchase rate for a **leg** (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegFactor
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The amortization **factor** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegRedemptionDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The redemption date for a **leg** (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CreditRating
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The published **credit rating** of the security or its issuer (e.g., 'AAA', 'B+').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Free-form string, though typically aligned with rating agency standards.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCreditRating
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **credit rating** of the **underlying security** of a derivative.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegCreditRating
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **credit rating** of the instrument for a specific **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradedFlatSwitch
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that specifies whether a debt instrument is **trading flat (without accrued interest)** or is trading normally ('switch').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are 'Y' (Traded Flat) or 'N' (Traded with Interest).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BasisFeatureDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A date used in the calculation of the 'basis' price for certain fixed income instruments or derivatives.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BasisFeaturePrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A price used in the calculation of the 'basis' price for certain fixed income instruments or derivatives.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** assigned to a Market Data Request (MsgType='V') message. The exchange/venue returns this ID in all related market data reports and incremental updates.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory for market data requests. Used to manage market data subscriptions (Subscribe, Unsubscribe, Snapshot).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SubscriptionRequestType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **type of service requested** for the market data (e.g., a one-time snapshot, a continuous update subscription, or a cancellation).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Snapshot), '1' (Subscribe), '2' (Unsubscribe). Mandatory for Market Data Request (MsgType='V').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MarketDepth
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **level of market data detail requested** for the order book. This controls how many price levels (depth of book) the counterparty should send.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Full Book), '1' (Top of Book/Best Bid/Offer), 'n' (Specific number of price levels).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDUpdateType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies whether the requested market data updates should be sent as **full refreshes or incremental updates**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Full Refresh), '1' (Incremental Refresh). Mandatory for Market Data Request (MsgType='V').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AggregatedBook
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator specifying whether the market data book entries should be **aggregated by price (Yes) or sent un-aggregated** with individual broker IDs (No).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Value 'Y' (Yes) means quantities from different brokers at the same price are summed into one entry.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoMDEntryTypes
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of specific market data entry types** (MDEntryType, 269) that the requester is interested in receiving. Marks the start of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data Request (MsgType='V') to filter the types of data (e.g., only Trades and Bids).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoMDEntries
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of market data entries** contained within the message. Marks the beginning of the repeating group for individual market data quotes, trades, or statistics.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory in Market Data Snapshot (MsgType='W') and Incremental Refresh (MsgType='X') messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **type of data represented by the market data entry** (e.g., a Bid quote, an Offer quote, a Trade, or a Trade Volume).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Common values include '0' (Bid), '1' (Offer), '2' (Trade), 'B' (Open Interest), 'E' (Settlement Price). Used in the repeating group defined by NoMDEntries (268).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price** associated with the market data entry (e.g., the Bid Price, the Offer Price, or the Last Trade Price).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. The meaning of the price is determined by the accompanying MDEntryType (269).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntrySize
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity (shares/contracts)** associated with the market data entry (e.g., the Bid Size, the Offer Size, or the Trade Volume).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The meaning of the size is determined by the accompanying MDEntryType (269).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date** on which the market data entry was generated or recorded.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **time** on which the market data entry was generated or recorded.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (HH:MM:SS.sss). Often combined with MDEntryDate (272).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TickDirection
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **direction of the current trade price** relative to the previous trade price. Used to enforce short-sale or tick-rule compliance.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Up Tick), '1' (Down Tick), '2' (Equal - up), '3' (Equal - down).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDMkt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Market of the market data entry (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used. Replaced by SecurityExchange (207) or MDMkt (464) and related party fields.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteCondition
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Conditions associated with the quote (e.g., Locked, Crossed).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'A' (Open), 'C' (Closed), 'L' (Locked), 'H' (Trading Halt).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeCondition
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Conditions associated with the trade (e.g., Opening Trade, Late Trade).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'A' (Opening Trade), 'B' (Bargain Trade), 'G' (Gross Price).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a specific market data entry within the Market Data Incremental Refresh (MsgType='X'). This allows for precise updates and deletions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory for Market Data Incremental Refresh when MDUpdateAction (279) is 'Change' or 'Delete'.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDUpdateAction
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **action to be taken** on the corresponding market data entry. Used in Market Data Incremental Refresh to specify changes to the book or trade stream.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (New), '1' (Change/Update), '2' (Delete). This is crucial for correctly reconstructing the order book.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The MDEntryID (278) of a **previous Market Data Entry** being referenced, usually for correction or deletion in an incremental update.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data Incremental Refresh (MsgType='X').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDReqRejReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** why a Market Data Request (MsgType='V') was rejected by the market data provider.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data Request Reject (MsgType='Y').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryOriginator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Originator of the Market Data Entry (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used. Use PartyID (448) and PartyRole (452) in the MD repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LocationID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Physical location identifier.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Generally deprecated in favor of PartyID (448) with PartyRole (452).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DeskID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Trading desk identifier.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Generally deprecated in favor of PartyID (448) with PartyRole (452).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DeleteReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The reason why a market data entry was deleted from the book.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data Incremental Refresh (MsgType='X') when MDUpdateAction (279)='2'.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OpenCloseSettlFlag
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates whether a price is an **Opening, Closing, or Settlement price**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Daily Open), '1' (Session Open), '2' (Session Close), '4' (Settlement Price).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SellerDays
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Number of days the seller has to deliver the security.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryBuyer
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Buyer associated with the market data entry (e.g., the broker ID of the buyer for a trade).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data messages for trade transparency.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntrySeller
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Seller associated with the market data entry (e.g., the broker ID of the seller for a trade).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data messages for trade transparency.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryPositionNo
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **rank or position** of the market data entry in the order book for that price level (e.g., 1st bid at that price, 2nd bid, etc.).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used only for un-aggregated book view (AggregatedBook, 266, is 'N').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: FinancialStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **financial condition** of the security's issuer (e.g., Bankrupt, Delinquent). Used to indicate potential risk or trading restrictions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are coded and often relate to regulatory or exchange-mandated status flags.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CorporateAction
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates if a **corporate action** is pending on the security that may impact its price or trading.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'A' (Ex-Dividend), 'B' (Ex-Distribution).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DefBidSize
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Default bid size for security or trading session.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DefOfferSize
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Default offer size for security or trading session.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoQuoteEntries
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of individual quote entries** (Bid/Offer pair) included in a Quote message (MsgType='S'). Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Quote messages (MsgType='S').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoQuoteSets
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of quote sets** included in a Quote message. Used for multi-level or multi-venue quoting.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Quote messages (MsgType='S').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status** of the Quote (MsgType='S'), indicating its current lifecycle state (e.g., Accepted, Rejected, Expired).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Accepted), '5' (Expired), '9' (Rejected).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteCancelType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **scope of cancellation** for a Quote Cancel message (MsgType='Z') (e.g., cancel all quotes, cancel by security, cancel by quote set).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Cancel for Security), '4' (Cancel for Quote Set), '8' (Cancel All Quotes).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteEntryID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a single quote entry (Bid/Offer pair) within a Quote message (MsgType='S').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoQuoteEntries (295).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteRejectReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for the rejection of a Quote message (MsgType='S').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when QuoteStatus (297) is '9' (Rejected).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteResponseLevel
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The level of response requested from the counterparty when a Quote Request is sent.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (No response), '1' (Acknowledge only), '2' (Acknowledge and best quote).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteSetID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a logical grouping of multiple quote entries, typically for related instruments (e.g., a volatility surface).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoQuoteSets (296).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteRequestType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the nature of the Quote Request (MsgType='R'), such as whether it's for a specific price, market making, or a specific block size.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Manual), '2' (Automatic).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotNoQuoteEntries
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of quote entries** that make up the complete quote set, used for message fragmentation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Quote messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSecurityIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used for the identifier of the **underlying security** (UnderlyingSecurityID, 309).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingIssuer
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **issuer's name** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSecurityDesc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A free-form **description** of the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSecurityExchange
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **exchange** where the **underlying security** is primarily traded.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSecurityID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier for the underlying security** of a derivative (e.g., the stock underlying an option). It is defined by the accompanying UnderlyingSecurityIDSource (305).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711). Mandatory for derivative instruments.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSecurityType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **category or type** of the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSymbol
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **ticker symbol** of the **underlying security**. Used for human-readable reference, similar to Symbol (55).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSymbolSfx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **suffix** for the **underlying symbol**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingMaturityMonthYear
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **month and year of maturity** for the **underlying security** (if applicable, e.g., a futures contract underlying an option).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMM** or **YYYYMMDD**. Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingMaturityDay
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The day of the month of maturity for the **underlying security** (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used. Full maturity date should use UnderlyingMaturityDate (542).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingPutOrCall
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies whether the **underlying option** is a Put ('0') or Call ('1').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingStrikePrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **strike price** for the **underlying option**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingOptAttribute
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An **option attribute** for the **underlying option**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency** of the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RatioQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **ratio (multiplier)** defining the proportional quantity of the underlying security relative to the main instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Integer quantity. Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for the Security Definition Request (MsgType='c') message. The ID is returned in the response.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for security definition requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityRequestType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **type of request** being made in the Security Definition Request (MsgType='c') (e.g., specific security, all securities of a type).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Request List), '1' (Request for security ID).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityResponseID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** assigned to the Security Definition (MsgType='d') response message. Links the response back to the request (SecurityReqID, 320).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for security definition responses.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityResponseType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of response** being delivered in the Security Definition (MsgType='d') message (e.g., List of securities, single security).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Accept), '5' (Reject).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityStatusReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for the Security Status Request (MsgType='v') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for security status requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnsolicitedIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the message (e.g., Security Status) was **not initiated by a specific request** from the counterparty.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are 'Y' (Unsolicited) or 'N' (Solicited/In response to request).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityTradingStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The ** current official trading status** of the security (e.g., Halted, Active, Suspended). Used to inform trading applications of available trading actions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '17' (Trading Halt), '18' (Resume Trading), '20' (Suspended). Used in Security Status (MsgType='f').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: HaltReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **reason for a trading halt** of a security, providing context for the SecurityTradingStatus (326)='17'.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'T' (News pending), 'O' (Order Imbalance), 'P' (Equipment Failure).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InViewOfCommon
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the trading status is **due to an event related to its underlying common stock**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DueToRelated
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the trading status is **due to an event related to an associated security** (e.g., a derivative of this instrument).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BuyVolume
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Current **Buy Volume** for a security in the market at the best price.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data (MsgType='W', 'X').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SellVolume
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Current **Sell Volume** for a security in the market at the best price.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data (MsgType='W', 'X').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: HighPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **highest price** at which the security has traded during the day or session.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data (MsgType='W', 'X').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LowPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **lowest price** at which the security has traded during the day or session.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data (MsgType='W', 'X').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Adjustment
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Type of adjustment applied to a price.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Trading Session Status Request (MsgType='g') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for trading session status requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradingSessionID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier for the current trading session** (e.g., 'DAY', 'PRE_OPEN'). Used to define when trading is possible and which rules apply.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trading Session Status (MsgType='h') and order messages to target specific sessions.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContraTrader
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **executing firm's designation** for the counterparty (contra-broker) in a bilateral trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8') when the broker knows the contra party.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **method of trading** utilized in the session (e.g., Open Outcry, Electronic).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Electronic), '2' (Open Outcry).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesMode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **mode of the session** (e.g., testing, training, production).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Testing), '3' (Production).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current operational status** of the trading session (TradingSessionID, 336). Informs users if the session is open, closed, or in an intermediate state.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Open), '1' (Close), '2' (Pre-Open), '3' (Pre-Close). Used in Trading Session Status (MsgType='h').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesStartTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheduled start time** of the trading session.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesOpenTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **actual time** the trading session opened.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesPreCloseTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **pre-close time** of the trading session (e.g., the transition period before the close).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesCloseTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **actual time** the trading session closed.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesEndTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheduled end time** of the trading session.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NumberOfOrders
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The number of orders associated with a trading session.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MessageEncoding
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoding scheme** used for all encoded (non-ASCII) fields within the message body (e.g., EncodedText, EncodedIssuer).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'ISO-8859-1' (Latin 1) or 'UTF-8'. Mandatory if any encoded fields are present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedIssuerLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedIssuer (349) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedIssuer (349) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedIssuer
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the Issuer (106) field. Allows for international characters in the issuer's name.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedSecurityDescLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedSecurityDesc (351) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedSecurityDesc (351) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedSecurityDesc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the SecurityDesc (107) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedListExecInstLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedListExecInst (353) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedListExecInst (353) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedListExecInst
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the ListExecInst (69) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedTextLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedText (355) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedText (355) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedText
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the Text (58) field. Allows for characters not supported in the base ASCII FIX standard (e.g., Cyrillic, Chinese, etc.).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedSubjectLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedSubject (357) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedSubject (357) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedSubject
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the Subject (147) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedHeadlineLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedHeadline (359) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedHeadline (359) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedHeadline
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the Headline (148) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedAllocTextLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedAllocText (361) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedAllocText (361) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedAllocText
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the AllocText (161) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedUnderlyingIssuerLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedUnderlyingIssuer (363) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedUnderlyingIssuer (363) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedUnderlyingIssuer
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the UnderlyingIssuer (306) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedUnderlyingSecurityDescLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedUnderlyingSecurityDesc (365) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedUnderlyingSecurityDesc (365) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedUnderlyingSecurityDesc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the UnderlyingSecurityDesc (307) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price used for the allocation** calculation, typically derived from the trade's execution price.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Allocation Instruction messages (MsgType='J').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteSetValidUntilTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The date and time until which a **quote set** (QuoteSetID, 302) remains valid. After this time, the quote set should be considered expired.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss). Used in Quote messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteEntryRejectReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** why a specific Quote Entry (QuoteEntryID, 299) within a Quote message was rejected.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Quote messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LastMsgSeqNumProcessed
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **most recent MsgSeqNum (34) of the counterparty's messages that was successfully processed** by the sending application. Used in certain session-level messages for synchronization checks.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Key Note:** Sent from the recipient in an Execution Report (MsgType='8') to confirm which of the original order messages they have successfully accepted/processed from the initiator.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OnBehalfOfSendingTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Original SendingTime of the message before it was forwarded (Deprecated/No Longer Used).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used. Replaced by OrigSendingTime (122) when PossDupFlag (43) is set to 'Y'.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefTagID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **tag number of the field** that caused the immediate preceding message (RefMsgType, 372) to be rejected, typically at the session or business level.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Reject (MsgType='3') and Business Message Reject (MsgType='j') messages to pinpoint the specific erroneous field.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefMsgType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **MsgType (35) of the message** that is being referenced, typically because it was rejected or caused a problem.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Reject (MsgType='3') and Business Message Reject (MsgType='j') messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SessionRejectReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for a session-level protocol violation rejection (MsgType='3'). These errors indicate fundamental FIX protocol problems.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Key Note:** Values include '1' (Required tag missing), '3' (Invalid tag number), '9' (Incorrect checksum). When present, the connection is typically still considered valid.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidRequestTransType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **transaction type** for the Bid Request message (MsgType='k'), indicating whether it's a new request or a cancellation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'N' (New), 'C' (Cancel).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContraBroker
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **broker ID** of the counterparty in a trade where the executing firm knows the contra party.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ComplianceID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An identifier used for **compliance purposes**, allowing the client or firm to tag messages for regulatory tracking or internal audit trails.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SolicitedFlag
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the order or quote was **solicited** (requested) by the counterparty.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are 'Y' (Solicited) or 'N' (Unsolicited). Used for regulatory reporting.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExecRestatementReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for sending an Execution Report (MsgType='8') when it is a restatement (correction) of a previously sent Execution Report.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (GT corporate action), '1' (GT renewal), '2' (FIFO reset).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BusinessRejectRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The ClOrdID (11) or other relevant ID from the **message being rejected at the business level**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Business Message Reject (MsgType='j').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BusinessRejectReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for rejecting a business-level message (e.g., a New Order or Allocation) because of an application-level constraint or error.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '2' (Unknown security), '3' (Unsupported message type), '5' (Unsupported CtlOrdType). Used in Business Message Reject (MsgType='j').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: GrossTradeAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total monetary amount** of the trade before accounting for commissions, taxes, or net settlement adjustments. Calculated as Quantity * Price (+/- Accrued Interest).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoContraBrokers
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of contra-brokers** involved in the trade. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for contra-broker details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MaxMessageSize
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **maximum number of bytes** that a counterparty system is capable of accepting in a single FIX message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Logon (MsgType='A') to negotiate message size limits.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoMsgTypes
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of message types** being referenced in a message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in administrative messages to list supported or requested message types.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MsgDirection
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **intended direction** of the message flow (e.g., 'S' for Send or 'R' for Receive).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in administrative messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoTradingSessions
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of trading sessions** (TradingSessionID, 336) being described or referenced.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trading Session Status messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotalVolumeTraded
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total cumulative volume** traded in the security during a specific period (usually the current day or session).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data messages (MsgType='W', 'X').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DiscretionInst
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Instructions regarding how the **discretionary price feature** of an order should be handled.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for Discretionary Limit orders to define the discretionary mechanism.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DiscretionOffsetValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary or fractional offset value** defining the size of the discretionary price movement from the primary limit price.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. The sign of the offset is often inferred from the order Side (54).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** assigned by the initiating party to a Bid Request message (MsgType='k').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for Bid Request messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ClientBidID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **client-assigned unique identifier** for a Bid Request message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Allows the client to reference their initial request.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ListName
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The descriptive **name of the list** (basket) of orders (ListID, 66).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in New Order List (MsgType='E').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotNoRelatedSym
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of related securities** in a series of security definition messages, used for message fragmentation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages (MsgType='d').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **type of bid** (e.g., Non-Disclosed, Disclosed) being submitted.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Non-Disclosed), '2' (Disclosed).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NumTickets
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The number of tickets/allocations associated with a bid.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideValue1
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary value** associated with the first side of a split/multi-sided transaction (e.g., in a bid where the transaction involves two currency pairs).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Bid Request (MsgType='k').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideValue2
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary value** associated with the second side of a split/multi-sided transaction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Bid Request (MsgType='k').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoBidDescriptors
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of bid descriptors** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for describing the bid's purpose or characteristics.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Bid Request (MsgType='k').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidDescriptorType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of descriptor** for the bid (e.g., name, percentage, index).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoBidDescriptors (398).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidDescriptor
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **value or content** of the bid descriptor.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoBidDescriptors (398).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideValueInd
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates which side value (SideValue1, 396 or SideValue2, 397) is the **primary side** of the transaction for reporting purposes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (SideValue1 is the primary) or '2' (SideValue2 is the primary).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LiquidityPctLow
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **lower boundary (percentage)** of the desired liquidity range for an order or bid.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity (e.g., 0.10 for 10%).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LiquidityPctHigh
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **upper boundary (percentage)** of the desired liquidity range for an order or bid.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LiquidityValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary value** associated with liquidity (e.g., total cash value).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EFPTrackingError
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The acceptable tracking error **percentage** for an Exchange for Physical (EFP) trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: FairValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **calculated fair market value** of a portfolio or instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OutsideIndexPct
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The maximum acceptable deviation **percentage** from the index price for a bid/order.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ValueOfFutures
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary value** of the futures component of an EFP or complex strategy.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LiquidityIndType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of liquidity indicator** used (e.g., Relative to Current Volume, Relative to Average Volume).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: WtAverageLiquidity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **weighted average liquidity** calculated over a given period.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExchangeForPhysical
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', signifies that the transaction is an **Exchange for Physical (EFP)** trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OutMainCntryUIndex
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The value of an index located **outside the main country** of trading.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CrossPercent
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **percentage of the trade** that is intended to be crossed internally.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity (e.g., 0.50 for 50%).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ProgRptReqs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Defines the **requirements for progress reporting** of a list or strategy (e.g., report on completion, report at intervals).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Report on Execution), '2' (Report on CXL).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ProgPeriodInterval
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The time **interval (in seconds)** at which progress reports (ProgRptReqs, 414) should be generated.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: IncTaxInd
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the price or value **includes applicable tax**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are 'Y' (Tax Included) or 'N' (Tax Excluded).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NumBidders
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of competing bidders** for a transaction.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidTradeType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of trade** associated with the bid price, typically used in market data or IOI messages to provide context on the nature of the transaction (e.g., Block Trade, EFP).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Renamed from the less specific TradeType in earlier FIX versions.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BasisPxType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **type of price used for basis calculation** in complex fixed income or strategy orders (e.g., VWAP Price, Current Price).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoBidComponents
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of bid components** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for complex bid structures.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Bid Request (MsgType='k').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Country
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **country code** associated with a party, security, or exchange (uses ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 standard).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in various contexts where geographical origin is required.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotNoStrikes
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of strike prices** for a series of options being referenced, used for message fragmentation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages (MsgType='d').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **type of price** being represented (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Amount, Per Share). This is essential for interpreting the value in the Price (44) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Percentage), '2' (Per Share/Unit), '3' (Fixed Amount).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DayOrderQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total quantity entered for the order** across the current day's trading sessions. Used for daily reconciliation.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DayCumQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total cumulative quantity executed for the order** across the current day's trading sessions.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DayAvgPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **average price of all executions** for the order across the current day's trading sessions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: GTBookingInst
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Instructions regarding **how a Good-Till-Date/Time (GT) order should be handled** when it expires or is canceled/replaced.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Book out user for day), '2' (Book out all trades).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoStrikes
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of strike prices** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for option strike details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages (MsgType='d').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ListStatusType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **reason or nature of the List Status** (MsgType='N') message (e.g., Ack, Reject, Executing).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Immediate), '2' (WaitForConfirm).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NetGrossInd
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates if an amount field (e.g., NetMoney, 118) is the **Net amount or the Gross amount**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are '1' (Net) or '2' (Gross).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ListOrderStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current status of the entire order list** (ListID, 66) at the executing entity.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Received for execution), '2' (Began executing), '6' (Finished executing).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExpireDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date** on which an order, quote, or other message instruction ceases to be effective or valid.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Required for TimeInForce (59)='6' (Good Till Date, GTD). Used in conjunction with ExpireTime (126).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ListExecInstType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of execution instruction** provided for the list (e.g., immediate execution, confirmation required).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Immediate), '2' (WaitForConfirm).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CxlRejResponseTo
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates whether the rejection (Order Cancel Reject, MsgType='9') is a response to an **Order Cancel Request (MsgType='F') or an Order Mass Cancel Request (MsgType='q')**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Cancel Request) or '2' (Mass Cancel Request).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCouponRate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coupon rate** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingContractMultiplier
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **contract multiplier** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContraTradeQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity traded** by the specific contra-broker/trader being reported.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoContraBrokers (382).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContraTradeTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **execution time** of the trade as reported by the specific contra-broker/trader.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss). Used in the repeating group defined by NoContraBrokers (382).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ClearingFirm
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier of the clearing firm** responsible for clearing and settling the trade (Deprecated/Replaced).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/Replaced by PartyID (448) with PartyRole (452)='4' (Clearing Firm) in the NoPartyIDs repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ClearingAccount
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **account number** at the clearing firm (ClearingFirm, 439) to which the transaction is booked (Deprecated/Replaced).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/Replaced by PartyID (448) with PartyRole (452)='5' (Clearing Account) in the NoPartyIDs repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LiquidityNumSecurities
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of securities** that contribute to the reported liquidity for a bid/order.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MultiLegReportingType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **reporting convention** when dealing with complex or multi-leg financial instruments (e.g., combinations, spreads, strategies).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Single security in a multileg order), '2' (Multileg security - legs are reported), '3' (Individual leg reports, separate trades).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StrikeTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **time of day** that the strike price is deemed active or fixed.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ListStatusText
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A free-form **text description** providing details about the ListOrderStatus (431) (e.g., reason for failure or delay).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: For encoded characters, use EncodedListStatusText (446).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedListStatusTextLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedListStatusText (446) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedListStatusText (446) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedListStatusText
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the ListStatusText (444) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PartyIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to identify the entity in the accompanying PartyID (448). This is critical for interpreting the identifier's type.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'C' (BIC), 'D' (General ID), 'H' (CUSIP), 'G' (ISIN). Mandatory when PartyID (448) is used.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PartyID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier** for a single entity (firm, clearing house, individual, custodian, etc.) involved in the transaction. Its role is defined by PartyRole (452).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Key Note:** Part of the versatile Party repeating group structure (NoPartyIDs, 453). It is the central piece of party identification in FIX since v4.4.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotalVolumeTradedDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Date for which TotalVolumeTraded (387) is reported (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotalVolumeTraded Time
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Time for which TotalVolumeTraded (387) is reported (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NetChgPrevDay
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The net **monetary change** of the security's price from the previous day's closing price.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PartyRole
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Defines the **function or responsibility** of the entity identified by the corresponding PartyID (448) within the trade or message context.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Key Note:** Values include '1' (Executing Firm), '4' (Clearing Firm), '11' (Security Settlement Agent), '12' (Cash Settlement Agent). Mandatory when PartyID (448) is used.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoPartyIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of different entities (parties)** being specified in the message. Marks the beginning of a highly flexible repeating group for party identification.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: This repeating group replaces many individual, fixed Party-related tags from earlier FIX versions (e.g., ClientID, BrokerOfCredit, ClearingFirm).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoSecurityAltID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of alternative security identifiers** being specified for the instrument. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to provide multiple ways to identify the same instrument (e.g., CUSIP, Bloomberg, RIC).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityAltID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An **alternate identifier** for the security (e.g., a secondary internal ticker or exchange symbol).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSecurityAltID (454).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityAltIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** defining the format and context of the accompanying SecurityAltID (455).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSecurityAltID (454).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoUnderlyingSecurityAltID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of alternative security identifiers** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSecurityAltID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An **alternate identifier** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyingSecurityAltID (457).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSecurityAltIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** defining the format and context of the accompanying UnderlyingSecurityAltID (458).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyingSecurityAltID (457).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Product
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **asset class or category** of the instrument (e.g., Equity, Commodity, Currency).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Agency), '2' (Commodity), '3' (Corporate), '4' (Currency).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CFICode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **Classification of Financial Instruments (CFI) code**, a structured, six-character code defining the security's type and characteristics (e.g., Equity/Option Type, Bond Type).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used as an international standard for describing the asset class and type of instrument.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingProduct
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **asset class or category** of the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCFICode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **CFI Code** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TestMessageIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the message is being transmitted for **testing purposes only** and should not be processed by any production trading logic.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Key Note:** Values are 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Crucial for production safety; a test message can look identical to a real order.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuantityType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Type of quantity (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used. Replaced by QtyType (854) or inferred from context.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BookingRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** assigned by the post-trade system for the transaction. This ID is used for accounting and settlement booking purposes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to link a trade to an internal booking system entry.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: IndividualAllocID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier for a single allocation entry** within an Allocation Instruction or Report message. Used when individual allocations need their own unique reference ID.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAllocs (78).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RoundingDirection
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method for rounding** quantity calculations when the fractional part must be addressed (e.g., for minimum trade size rules).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Nearest), '1' (Down), '2' (Up).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RoundingModulus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **decimal quantity** to which fractional quantities must be rounded when using RoundingDirection (468) (e.g., to the nearest 100 shares).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CountryOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **country code** where the security was issued. Uses ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 standard.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StateOrProvinceOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **state or province** where the security was issued (if applicable).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LocaleOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **city or locale** where the security was issued (if applicable).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoRegistDtls
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of repeating registration details** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for holder information.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration Instructions (MsgType='r') and Registration Status (MsgType='r').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MailingDtls
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **full mailing details** (address, postal code, etc.) for the registered holder.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InvestorCountryOfResidence
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **country code of residence** for the investor, used for tax and regulatory purposes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Uses ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 standard.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PaymentRef
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reference identifier** for a cash payment or distribution.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DistribPaymentMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method for cash distribution payment** (e.g., Wire, ACH, Draft).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CashDistribCurr
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency** for a cash distribution or payment.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CommCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency** in which the Commission (12) is denominated.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CancellationRights
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator specifying whether the investor **has the right to cancel** the transaction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MoneyLaunderingStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status of anti-money laundering (AML) checks** performed on the investor/transaction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for regulatory reporting.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MailingInst
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specific **instructions for mailing** documents or statements.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TransBkdTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date and time** at which the transaction was booked (i.e., entered into the post-trade accounting system).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss). Should occur after TransactTime (60).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExecPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **type of price** used for execution (e.g., Bid, Offer, Last Trade Price).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'B' (Bid), 'O' (Offer), 'L' (Last).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExecPriceAdjustment
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An **adjustment amount** applied to the execution price, separate from commission or tax.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DateOfBirth
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date of birth** of the individual investor, used for regulatory or KYC (Know Your Customer) purposes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeReportTransType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **type of transaction** for the Trade Capture Report (MsgType='AE'), indicating if the report is new, a cancellation, or a replacement.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (New), '1' (Cancel), '2' (Replace), '4' (Release), '5' (Reverse).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CardHolderName
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **name of the cardholder** for payment via card.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CardNumber
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **credit or debit card number** used for payment.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CardExpDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **expiration date** of the payment card.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CardIssNum
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **card issue number** (if required by the issuing bank).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PaymentMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method of payment** used for a transaction (e.g., Card, ACH, Wire).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistAcctType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of account registration** (e.g., Individual, Joint, Trust).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Designation
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **investor designation** (e.g., 'Retirement Fund', 'IRA').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TaxAdvantageType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of tax advantage** the investment/account qualifies for (e.g., IRA, 401k).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistRejReasonText
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A free-form **text explanation** for the rejection of a Registration Instruction (RegistStatus, 506, is 'Rejected').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: For encoded characters, use EncodedText (355).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: FundRenewWaiv
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator specifying whether a **fund renewal fee is waived**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CashDistribAgentName
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **name of the cash distribution agent**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CashDistribAgentCode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **code of the cash distribution agent**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CashDistribAgentAcctNumber
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **account number** at the cash distribution agent.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CashDistribPayRef
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **payment reference** associated with the cash distribution.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CashDistribAgentAcctName
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **account name** at the cash distribution agent.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CardStartDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **start date** (issue date) of the payment card.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PaymentDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date of the actual payment** or cash distribution.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PaymentRemitterID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier of the remitter** (sender) of the payment.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status of a Registration Instruction** (MsgType='r'), indicating whether the instruction was successfully processed, accepted pending, or rejected.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Accepted), '1' (Rejected).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistRejReasonCode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for the rejection of a Registration Instruction (MsgType='r').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when RegistStatus (506) is '1' (Rejected).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reference ID** used to link related Registration messages (e.g., a Request to its Response).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistDtls
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A generic field for **registration details** or notes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoDistribInsts
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of distribution instruction groups** for allocating shares or funds. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Instruction (MsgType='J').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistEmail
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **email address** for the registered holder.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DistribPercentage
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **percentage** of the total funds/shares to be distributed to a specific party in the distribution instruction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoDistribInsts (510).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Registration Instruction (MsgType='r') or Registration Status Request (MsgType='t'). Used for tracking the full registration workflow.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RegistTransType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **transaction type** for a Registration Instruction (e.g., New, Cancel, Replace).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (New), '1' (Cancel), '2' (Replace).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExecValuationPoint
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **time of day** that the transaction's execution value is determined (e.g., for mutual funds, usually the market close).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderPercent
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The order quantity **expressed as a percentage** of a known value (e.g., percentage of volume, percentage of cash).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity (e.g., 0.10 for 10%).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OwnershipType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **legal classification of account ownership** (e.g., Joint Tenants, Trust, Partnership).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoContAmts
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of contingent amounts** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for associated costs/fees.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Instruction (MsgType='J').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContAmtType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of contingent amount** being specified (e.g., Fund Fee, Brokerage Fee).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoContAmts (518).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContAmtValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary value** of the contingent amount.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoContAmts (518).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContAmtCurr
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency** of the contingent amount.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoContAmts (518).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OwnerType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of owner** of the security/account.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Registration messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PartySubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **sub-identifier** that further qualifies the entity defined by PartyID (448) and PartyRole (452). This is part of the original Party block structure.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Replaced by the full sub-group structure (NoPartySubIDs, 802, and PartySubIDType, 803) in later versions, but remains as part of the original structure.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NestedPartyID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An **identifier for a party** nested within a repeating group (e.g., a contact person within a clearing firm).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in nested Party structures, typically within another repeating group like NoAllocs (78).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NestedPartyIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used for the NestedPartyID (524).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in nested Party structures.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryClOrdID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary client order identifier**. Used when a client manages two parallel identification systems.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Complements ClOrdID (11).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryExecID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary execution identifier**. Used when an exchange or matching system maintains a secondary ID for the execution event.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Complements ExecID (17).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderCapacity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **general capacity** under which the order is entered (e.g., Agency, Principal, Market Maker). It has been introduced to replace the legacy Rule80A (47) concept.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'A' (Agency), 'P' (Principal), 'I' (Individual), 'R' (Riskless Principal).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderRestrictions
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specific **regulatory or operational restrictions** on the handling or execution of the order (e.g., foreign entity restriction).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Multiple values can be combined using spaces.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MassCancelRequestType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Defines the **scope** of an Order Mass Cancel Request (MsgType='q'), specifying what group of orders the request applies to.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Cancel orders for a Security), '2' (Cancel orders for an Exchange), '7' (Cancel all orders).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MassCancelResponse
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status** of the Order Mass Cancel Request (MsgType='r'), indicating whether it was successfully processed, rejected, or completed with warnings.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Cancel all orders successfully processed), '6' (Reject - Mass Cancel Not Supported).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MassCancelRejectReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for rejecting an Order Mass Cancel Request (MsgType='q').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when MassCancelResponse (531) is '6'.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotalAffectedOrders
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of orders** that were affected by a Mass Cancel operation (MsgType='r').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Order Mass Cancel Report (MsgType='r').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoAffectedOrders
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of individual orders affected** by a mass cancel operation being listed in the current message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Order Mass Cancel Report (MsgType='r').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AffectedOrderID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **OrderID (37)** of a single order affected by the Mass Cancel operation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAffectedOrders (534).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AffectedSecondaryOrderID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **SecondaryOrderID (198)** of a single order affected by the Mass Cancel operation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAffectedOrders (534).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Defines the **classification or type of the quote** provided (e.g., an indicative quote versus a firm/tradeable quote).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Indicative), '1' (Tradeable/Firm), '2' (Restricted Tradeable).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NestedPartyRole
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **role** of the NestedPartyID (524).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in nested Party structures.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoNestedPartyIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of nested parties** being identified within a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to convey multiple roles (e.g., a custodian and a clearing contact) for a single allocation or order.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotalAccruedInterestAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Total accrued interest amount (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used. Use AccruedInterestAmt (159).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MaturityDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **full date of maturity** for a security, often used to unambiguously define the expiry date for a derivative or bond.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Replaces the combination of MaturityMonthYear (200) and MaturityDay (205) when a single date field is preferred.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingMaturityDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **full date of maturity** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrRegistry
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **registry or location** where the security is listed or formally registered (e.g., 'DTCC', 'Euroclear').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CashMargin
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates whether the trade is a **Cash (fully funded) or Margin (leveraged) transaction**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Cash), '2' (Margin).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NestedPartySubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-identifier** for the NestedPartyID (524).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in nested Party structures.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Scope
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scope or extent** of the information, often for market data or compliance reporting.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Local), '2' (National), '3' (Global).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDImplicitDelete
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', implies that any previously advertised market data entry **at the same price/level** should be deleted.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data Incremental Refresh (MsgType='X').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CrossID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** assigned by the client to a Cross Order (MsgType='s'). Used for tracking the matched cross trade opportunity.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Similar function to ClOrdID (11) but specific to a two-sided cross transaction.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CrossType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **conditions under which a cross trade** (two sides of a single transaction) can be executed, dictating the time-in-force and matching rules.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Cross AON - All or None), '2' (Cross Trade - matched price, single execution).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CrossPrioritization
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies which side of the cross trade is **given priority** for execution in the event of partial fill or market intervention.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (None), '1' (Buy side priority), '2' (Sell side priority).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrigCrossID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The CrossID (548) of the **original cross order** being referenced, typically for a Cancel or Replace request.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Cross Order Cancel Request (MsgType='u') or Cross Order Modification Request (MsgType='v').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoSides
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of sides (legs)** involved in the message, specifically for cross orders (MsgType='s'). Must be '2' for a standard cross order.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to denote the start of the repeating group containing the details for each side of the cross.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Username
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **user's login identifier** at the application layer, typically required for Logon (MsgType='A').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for application-level user identification, separate from session-level IDs like SenderCompID (49).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Password
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **user's password**, sent in clear text (unless EncryptedPassword, 1402, is used). Used for Logon (MsgType='A').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Should be securely handled and transmitted.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoLegs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of individual legs (instruments)** that form a multi-leg or combination security (e.g., an option strategy or a spread). Marks the beginning of the repeating group for leg details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory for multi-leg orders/instruments (e.g., Order Single on Multi-leg instrument, MsgType='D' with NoLegs > 0).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency** in which the prices/amounts for a specific **leg** are denominated.
