FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotNoSecurityTypes
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of security types** expected in a fragmented response to a Security List Request.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security List messages (MsgType='y').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoSecurityTypes
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of security types** included in the current Security List message (MsgType='y').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security List messages (MsgType='y').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityListRequestType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of list requested** in a Security List Request (MsgType='x') (e.g., all securities of a given type, specific symbols).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Request List), '2' (Request for specific symbols).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityRequestResult
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **result of the Security Definition Request** (MsgType='c'), indicating success or a specific failure reason.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages (MsgType='d').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RoundLot
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **standard trading quantity** (in shares/contracts) that constitutes a 'round lot' for the security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MinTradeVol
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **minimum acceptable volume** for a single execution (fill).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition or trade rules.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MultiLegRptTypeReq
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **required reporting method** for multi-leg trade reports (e.g., combined strategy report only, or individual leg reports).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Reporting of strategy legs is a requirement), '2' (Reporting of strategy legs is optional).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegPositionEffect
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **position effect** (Open/Close) for a specific **leg** of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegCoveredOrUncovered
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **covered or uncovered** indicator for a specific **leg** (usually an option leg).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price** for a specific **leg** of the multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradSesStatusRejReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for rejecting a Trading Session Status Request (MsgType='g').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trading Session Status messages (MsgType='h').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeRequestID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Trade Capture Report Request (MsgType='AD'). Used to track a request for trade history or matching.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for trade report requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeRequestType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of action requested** in a Trade Capture Report Request (MsgType='AD'), defining the purpose of the request.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Search for trades matching criteria), '1' (Request a trade to be matched), '3' (Request for all trades for a date).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PreviouslyReported
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the trade was **previously reported** to a regulatory body.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used in Trade Capture Reports (MsgType='AE').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeReportID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **unique identifier** assigned to a Trade Capture Report (MsgType='AE' or 'AR'). This ID is assigned by the party submitting the trade report.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for trade reporting messages. Used to cancel or replace a specific trade report.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeReportRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The TradeReportID (571) of a **previous Trade Capture Report** being referenced (e.g., for cancellation or correction).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trade Capture Report (MsgType='AE') when TradeReportTransType (487) is '1' (Cancel) or '2' (Replace).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MatchStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status of the trade matching process** (e.g., Matched, Confirmed, Unconfirmed).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (Confirmed), '1' (Unconfirmed), '2' (Mismatch).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MatchType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method or type of matching** used for the trade (e.g., automated match, brokered trade, one-sided report).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (One-Sided), '2' (Two-Sided), '3' (Confirmed - Match).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OddLot
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates an odd lot trade (Deprecated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Deprecated/No Longer Used. LotType (1093) is preferred.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoClearingInstructions
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of clearing instructions** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for clearing procedures.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ClearingInstruction
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **coded instruction** related to the clearing process for the trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoClearingInstructions (576).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeInputSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **source of the trade data** (e.g., manual entry, electronic execution).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Electronic), '2' (Manual).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeInputDevice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **device or terminal** used to input the trade data.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoDates
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of date/time groups** included in the message (e.g., multiple settlement or delivery dates). Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Instruction (MsgType='J').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AccountType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of account** for which the trade/order is intended (e.g., House, Customer).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (House), '2' (Client).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CustOrderCapacity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **customer's capacity** as required by regulatory authorities (e.g., member trading for their own account, proprietary). Used in conjunction with OrderCapacity (528).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: This field specifically addresses regulatory classification of the end customer.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ClOrdLinkID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **linking identifier** used to chain or relate multiple orders (ClOrdID, 11) that are part of a larger business transaction or a related set of trading instructions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Orders submitted using the same ClOrdLinkID are logically connected, e.g., orders for a multi-asset allocation or an algorithmic strategy launch.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MassStatusReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for an Order Mass Status Request (MsgType='AF'). The resulting status messages reference this ID.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to request the status of a group of orders (e.g., all active orders for a security).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MassStatusReqType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scope** of the Order Mass Status Request, specifying the criteria for selecting which orders to return the status for.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Status for all orders), '2' (Status for all orders for a security).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrigOrdModTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **TransactTime (60) of the original order modification** request. Used in Execution Reports following a modification.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSettlType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement type** (e.g., Regular, Cash) for a specific **leg** of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSettlDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement date** for a specific **leg** of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DayBookingInst
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Instructions for **how trades should be booked** throughout the day (e.g., booking on a separate day, clearing on a separate day).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (Can book out the trade later), '1' (Must book out trade on same day).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BookingUnit
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **unit of processing** for trade allocation (e.g., per individual order, per allocation group).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (Per Order), '1' (Per Allocation).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PreallocMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method used to pre-allocate** a trade (e.g., manual allocation, automated allocation).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (Not Pre-allocated), '1' (Pre-allocated).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCountryOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **country of issue** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingStateOrProvinceOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **state or province of issue** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingLocaleOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **locale of issue** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingInstrRegistry
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **instrument registry** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegCountryOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **country of issue** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegStateOrProvinceOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **state or province of issue** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegLocaleOfIssue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **locale of issue** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegInstrRegistry
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **instrument registry** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSymbol
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **ticker symbol** of the instrument representing a specific **leg** (component) of a multi-leg security or strategy.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555). Always accompanied by other leg instrument details.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSymbolSfx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **suffix** to the symbol for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSecurityID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **unique identifier** of the instrument for a specific **leg** (component) of a multi-leg security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555). Used in conjunction with LegSecurityIDSource (603).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSecurityIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used for the LegSecurityID (602).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoLegSecurityAltID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of alternative security identifiers** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSecurityAltID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An **alternate identifier** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegSecurityAltID (604).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSecurityAltIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** defining the format and context of the accompanying LegSecurityAltID (605).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegSecurityAltID (604).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegProduct
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **asset class or category** of the instrument for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegCFICode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **CFI Code** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSecurityType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **category or type** of the security for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegMaturityMonthYear
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **month and year of maturity** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMM** or **YYYYMMDD**. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegMaturityDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **full date of maturity** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegStrikePrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **strike price** for a **leg** (if an option).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegOptAttribute
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An **option attribute** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegContractMultiplier
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **contract multiplier** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegCouponRate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coupon rate** for a **leg** (if a bond).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSecurityExchange
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **exchange** where the security for a **leg** is primarily traded.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegIssuer
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **issuer's name** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedLegIssuerLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedLegIssuer (619) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedLegIssuer (619) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedLegIssuer
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the LegIssuer (617) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSecurityDesc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A free-form **description** of the security for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedLegSecurityDescLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the following EncodedLegSecurityDesc (622) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncodedLegSecurityDesc (622) is present.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncodedLegSecurityDesc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **encoded (non-ASCII) content** for the LegSecurityDesc (620) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encoding type must be specified in MessageEncoding (347).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegRatioQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **ratio (multiplier)** defining the proportional size of a specific **leg** in relation to the other legs of the complex security or strategy.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Integer quantity. If a spread is 1:2, one leg would have LegRatioQty=1 and the other LegRatioQty=2.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSide
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **side (Buy/Sell)** of the order for a specific **leg** of a multi-leg security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Buy), '2' (Sell). Defines the individual action required for this component of the strategy.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradingSessionSubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **sub-identifier** for the trading session (e.g., 'Opening', 'Closing' auction periods).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trading Session Status messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of allocation** being performed (e.g., Calculated, Ready for Clearing).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Calculated), '2' (Ready for Clearing).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoHops
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of intermediaries (hops)** that a message has passed through. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for routing history.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to trace the message route in multi-hop scenarios.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: HopCompID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **CompID (49)** of an intermediary system that passed the message along.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoHops (627).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: HopSendingTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **SendingTime (52)** of the message from an intermediary system.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss). Used in the repeating group defined by NoHops (627).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: HopRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reference identifier** assigned by an intermediary system to the message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoHops (627).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MidPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **mid-market price**, calculated as the average of the best bid and offer prices.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidYield
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **yield** on the bid side of a fixed income quote.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MidYield
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **mid-market yield** (average of bid and offer yields).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OfferYield
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **yield** on the offer side of a fixed income quote.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ClearingFeeIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **indicator for clearing fee assessment** (e.g., member, non-member, firm).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: WorkingIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the order is **currently being worked or held active** in the market by the broker or algorithm.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Working) or 'N' (Not Working). Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegLastPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **last execution price** for a specific **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group in an Execution Report.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PriorityIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An indicator used for **price/time priority** rules, often used during auction periods.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PriceImprovement
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary amount** of price improvement achieved by the execution for the client.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Price2
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary price** field, used when two prices are required for a transaction (e.g., for certain FX swaps or complex fixed income products).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LastForwardPoints2
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **second forward points** value for an FX swap or forward trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidForwardPoints2
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **second bid forward points** value for an FX swap or forward quote.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OfferForwardPoints2
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **second offer forward points** value for an FX swap or forward quote.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RFQReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** assigned to a Request for Quote (RFQ) message (MsgType='AH').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for RFQ messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MktBidPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current market's best bid price**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used for reference, e.g., in pegging calculations.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MktOfferPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current market's best offer price**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used for reference, e.g., in pegging calculations.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MinBidSize
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **minimum acceptable quantity** for a bid quote to be considered valid.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MinOfferSize
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **minimum acceptable quantity** for an offer quote to be considered valid.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteStatusReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Quote Status Request (MsgType='a') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for quote status requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegalConfirm
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that a **legal confirmation** is required for the transaction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingLastPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **last trade price** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in derivative messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingLastQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **last trade quantity** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in derivative messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecDefStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The status of the security definition.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages (MsgType='d').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reference ID** for a specific **leg** (component) within a message, allowing for linking or identifying the component uniquely.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContraLegRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reference ID** for the counterparty's leg (used for bilateral trade comparison).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trade Capture Reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlCurrBidFxRate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **bid FX rate** for converting from trade currency to settlement currency.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlCurrOfferFxRate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **offer FX rate** for converting from trade currency to settlement currency.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteRequestRejectReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for rejecting a Quote Request (MsgType='R').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Quote Request Reject (MsgType='b').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideComplianceID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **compliance identifier** specific to one side of a multi-sided trade (e.g., in a cross order).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AcctIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to identify the Account (1) ID.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (BIC), '2' (CUSIP), '3' (GNS). Replaced by PartyID (448) structure in many contexts.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocAcctIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to identify the AllocAccount (79) ID.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Replaced by Nested PartyID (524) structure in many contexts.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BenchmarkPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price** of the benchmark security (BenchmarkSecurityID, 699).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BenchmarkPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of price** (e.g., Mid, Last) used for the benchmark security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Bid), '2' (Offer), '3' (Mid).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ConfirmID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Confirmation (MsgType='AK') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for confirmation messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ConfirmStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status** of the confirmation (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Rejected).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Pending), '2' (Confirmed), '3' (Rejected).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ConfirmTransType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **transaction type** for the Confirmation message (e.g., New, Cancel, Replace).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (New), '1' (Cancel), '2' (Replace).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContractSettlMonth
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **contract settlement month and year** for futures or options.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMM** or **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DeliveryForm
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **physical or electronic form** of delivery for the security at settlement.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Book Entry), '2' (Physical).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LastParPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **par price** of the security for the last trade (used for fixed income).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoLegAllocs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of individual allocations** for a specific **leg**. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for leg allocation details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Report (MsgType='AS').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegAllocAccount
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **account** to which a **leg** quantity is allocated.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegAllocs (670).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegIndividualAllocID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **individual allocation ID** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegAllocs (670).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegAllocQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity** allocated to a **leg** account.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegAllocs (670).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegAllocAcctIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to identify the LegAllocAccount (671) ID.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegAllocs (670).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSettlCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement currency** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegBenchmarkCurveCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency of the benchmark curve** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegBenchmarkCurveName
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **name of the benchmark curve** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegBenchmarkCurvePoint
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **point on the benchmark curve** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegBenchmarkPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price** of the benchmark for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegBenchmarkPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of price** used for the benchmark for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegBidPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **bid price** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegIOIQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **IOI quantity** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoLegStipulations
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of stipulations** attached to a **leg**. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegOfferPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **offer price** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegOrderQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **order quantity** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of price** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **general quantity** for a **leg** (used generically when LegOrderQty or LegLastQty is not appropriate).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegStipulationType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of stipulation** for a **leg** (e.g., Maturity, Callable).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegStipulations (683).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegStipulationValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **value or content** of the stipulation for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegStipulations (683).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSwapType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of swap** for a **leg** (if applicable).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Pool
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **pool number or identifier** for a security, typically used for mortgage-backed securities.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuotePriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of price** represented by the Quote Price (e.g., Calculated Price, Percentage).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Percentage), '2' (Per Share/Unit).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteRespID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Quote Response (MsgType='AJ') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for quote response messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteRespType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of action or response** represented by the Quote Response (e.g., Hit/Take, Counter Offer).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Hit/Take), '2' (Counter).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuoteQualifier
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **qualification or condition** attached to the quote (e.g., 'firm', 'indicative', 'all or none').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Quote messages (MsgType='S').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: YieldRedemptionDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **redemption date** used as the basis for calculating the Yield (236).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Used in conjunction with YieldType (235).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: YieldRedemptionPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **redemption price** used as the basis for calculating the Yield (236).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in conjunction with YieldType (235).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: YieldRedemptionPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of price** (e.g., par, market) used for YieldRedemptionPrice (697).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in conjunction with YieldType (235).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BenchmarkSecurityID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier** of the security used as a benchmark reference.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in conjunction with BenchmarkSecurityIDSource (761).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ReversalIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that a trade or position is a **reversal** of a previous entry (e.g., to correct a booked trade).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Reversal) or 'N' (Not Reversal).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: YieldCalcDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date** used as the basis for calculating the Yield (236).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Used in conjunction with YieldType (235).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoPositions
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of positions** being reported. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for position details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Report (MsgType='AO').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of position** being reported (e.g., End of Day, Intraday, Transfer).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'ALC' (Allocation), 'TRN' (Transfer), 'FIN' (Final).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LongQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **long quantity** (owned or 'buy' side) of the position. Used in position messages.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoPositions (702).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ShortQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **short quantity** ('sell' side) of the position. Used in position messages.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoPositions (702).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosQtyStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status** of the position quantity (e.g., submitted, rejected, accepted).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Report (MsgType='AO').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosAmtType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of monetary amount** associated with the position (e.g., Cash, Market Value, Cost Basis).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoPosAmt (753).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary amount** associated with the position type (PosAmtType, 707).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoPosAmt (753).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosTransType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of position transaction** (e.g., Exercise, Allocation, Adjustment).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Maintenance Request (MsgType='AL').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Position Maintenance Request (MsgType='AL') or Position Request (MsgType='AN'). Used to track the request for a position report or modification.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for position inquiry messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoUnderlyings
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of underlying securities** included in the message (e.g., for a basket option). Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition and position messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosMaintAction
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **action** being taken in a Position Maintenance Request (MsgType='AL') (e.g., add, replace, cancel a position).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (New), '2' (Replace), '3' (Cancel).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrigPosReqRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **original PosReqID (710)** being referenced in a subsequent Position Maintenance or Position Report message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for tracking a chain of position requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosMaintRptRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **PosMaintRptID (721)** of a previous Position Maintenance Report being referenced.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for tracking position reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ClearingBusinessDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **business date** for which the clearing activity applies.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlSessID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier of the settlement session** (e.g., 'Normal', 'Special').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlSessSubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-identifier of the settlement session**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AdjustmentType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of adjustment** being made to a position.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Maintenance Request (MsgType='AL').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContraryInstructionIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the instruction is **contrary** to standing instructions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PriorSpreadIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that a **prior spread trade** is associated with the transaction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosMaintRptID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Position Maintenance Report (MsgType='AM') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for position maintenance reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosMaintStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status** of a Position Maintenance Request (MsgType='AM') (e.g., Accepted, Rejected).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (Accepted), '1' (Rejected).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosMaintResult
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **detailed result** of the Position Maintenance Request (e.g., successfully executed, partially rejected).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Maintenance Report (MsgType='AM').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosReqType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of position information** requested (e.g., full position snapshot, specific trades, assignments).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Request (MsgType='AN').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ResponseTransportType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method of transport** expected for the response message (e.g., FIX, Email, Out-of-band).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in requests to specify response delivery.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ResponseDestination
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **destination identifier** (e.g., CompID, email address) where the response should be sent.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in requests to specify response delivery.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotalNumPosReports
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of Position Reports** expected in a fragmented response.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Report (MsgType='AO').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosReqResult
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **detailed result** of the Position Request (e.g., successful search, no positions found).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Report (MsgType='AO').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PosReqStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status** of the Position Request (e.g., Accepted, Rejected, Completed).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (Accepted), '1' (Rejected), '3' (Completed).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price used for settlement purposes**, such as the final mark-to-market or closing price for a derivative. It is critical for calculating margin.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Position Reports (MsgType='AO').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of settlement price** (e.g., Final, Calculated).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Final), '2' (Calculated).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSettlPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement price** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSettlPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of settlement price** for the **underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Report (MsgType='AO').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PriorSettlPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **previous day's settlement price**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoQuoteQualifiers
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of quote qualifiers** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for conditions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Quote messages (MsgType='S').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocSettlCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement currency** for a specific allocation (AllocAccount, 79).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoAllocs (78) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocSettlCurrAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement currency amount** for a specific allocation (AllocAccount, 79).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoAllocs (78) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InterestAtMaturity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that **interest is paid at maturity** (e.g., for certain bonds).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegDatedDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **dated date** for a **leg** (if a bond).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**. Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegPool
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **pool number or identifier** for a **leg** (if a mortgage-backed security).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocInterestAtMaturity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary amount** of interest paid at maturity for an allocation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoAllocs (78) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocAccruedInterestAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary amount** of accrued interest for an allocation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the NoAllocs (78) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DeliveryDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date of delivery** for the physical commodity or security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **YYYYMMDD**.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AssignmentMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method used for assigning** an obligation (e.g., for option exercises).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Pro-Rata), '2' (Random).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AssignmentUnit
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity unit** used in the assignment process.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OpenInterest
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of outstanding contracts** for a derivative (futures or options).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data messages (MDEntryType='B').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExerciseMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method** by which an option or right is exercised.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Automatic), '2' (Manual).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotNumTradeReports
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of Trade Capture Reports** expected to be transmitted in a sequence, typically in response to a Trade Capture Report Request (MsgType='AD').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for fragmentation management, allowing the receiver to determine if all expected reports have been received.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeRequestResult
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **detailed result** of the Trade Capture Report Request (e.g., successful, invalid criteria).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trade Capture Report Request Ack (MsgType='AQ').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeRequestStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status** of the Trade Capture Report Request (e.g., Accepted, Rejected, Completed).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '0' (Accepted), '1' (Rejected), '2' (Completed).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeReportRejectReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for rejecting a Trade Capture Report (MsgType='AE').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trade Capture Report Reject (MsgType='AR').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideMultiLegReportingType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **multi-leg reporting convention** specific to one side of the trade (e.g., for a cross-trade where one side is reported as a single strategy and the other as legs).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Single Security), '2' (Multi-leg Security).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoPosAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of position amount groups** (e.g., market value, cash collateral) included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Position Report (MsgType='AO').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AutoAcceptIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the receiving party has **automatically accepted** the trade without manual intervention.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Auto-Accept) or 'N' (Manual Confirmation Required).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocReportID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for an Allocation Report (MsgType='AS'). Used for reporting the details of an allocation initiated by the Allocation Instruction (MsgType='J').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for Allocation Report messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoNested2PartyIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of nested parties** at the second level (nested within another Party repeating group).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to convey roles (e.g., agent/sub-account) within an already nested group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested2PartyID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier** for a party at the second nested level.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested2PartyIDs (756).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested2PartyIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used for the Nested2PartyID (757).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested2PartyIDs (756).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested2PartyRole
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **role** of the Nested2PartyID (757).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested2PartyIDs (756).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested2PartySubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-identifier** for the Nested2PartyID (757).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested2PartyIDs (756).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BenchmarkSecurityIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to identify the BenchmarkSecurityID (699).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in security definition.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecuritySubType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-type of the security** (e.g., for options: Non-Standard, Mini).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for detailed instrument classification.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSecuritySubType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-type of the underlying security**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoUnderlyings (711) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegSecuritySubType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-type of the security** for a **leg**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoLegs (555) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllowableOneSidednessPct
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **maximum acceptable percentage** difference between the two sides of a cross trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity (e.g., 0.005 for 0.5%).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllowableOneSidednessValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **maximum acceptable monetary value** difference between the two sides of a cross trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllowableOneSidednessCurr
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency** of the AllowableOneSidednessValue (766).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used with cross trades.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoTrdRegTimestamps
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of different time-stamps** related to the trade's regulatory reporting lifecycle. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for regulatory timestamps.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to convey timestamps like 'acceptance time' or 'regulatory reporting time' in Trade Capture Reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TrdRegTimestamp
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **actual date and time** of a specific event in the trade's regulatory reporting lifecycle, as defined by TrdRegTimestampType (770).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss). Used in the repeating group defined by NoTrdRegTimestamps (768).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TrdRegTimestampType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of event** that the TrdRegTimestamp (769) represents (e.g., Execution Time, Report Time, Entry Time).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Execution Time), '2' (Report Time), '3' (Entry Time).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TrdRegTimestampOrigin
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **source or originating entity** that recorded the TrdRegTimestamp (769).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoTrdRegTimestamps (768).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ConfirmRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **reference ID** of a prior Confirmation message (MsgType='AK') being referenced (e.g., for cancellation or replacement).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Confirmation (MsgType='AK').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ConfirmType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of confirmation** message being sent (e.g., Trade Confirmation, Settlement Confirmation).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Confirmation of a single trade), '2' (Confirmation of multiple trades).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ConfirmRejReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for rejecting a Confirmation (MsgType='AK').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Confirmation messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BookingType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of booking** used for the transaction (e.g., Regular, FIFO, Average Price).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values '1' (Regular), '2' (CFD), '3' (Strike/Warrant).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: IndividualAllocRejCode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for rejecting a specific individual allocation (AllocAccount, 79).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Report (MsgType='AS').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlInstMsgID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Settlement Instruction message (MsgType='T') (Replaced by SettlInstID, 162).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Settlement instructions in FIX.4.4+ generally use SettlInstID (162).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoSettlInst
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of settlement instruction groups** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Settlement Instruction messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LastUpdateTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date and time** of the last update or change to the information (e.g., for market data statistics).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format:** **UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocSettlInstType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of settlement instruction** (e.g., Standing Instructions, Specific Instructions) used for the allocation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Report (MsgType='AS').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoSettlPartyIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of parties involved in settlement** (e.g., custodian, agent bank). Marks the beginning of a repeating group for settlement party details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Settlement Instruction messages (MsgType='T').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlPartyID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier** for a party involved in settlement (e.g., BIC code).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSettlPartyIDs (781).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlPartyIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used for the SettlPartyID (782).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSettlPartyIDs (781).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlPartyRole
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **role** of the settlement party (e.g., Settling Bank, Custodian).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSettlPartyIDs (781).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlPartySubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-identifier** for the settlement party.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSettlPartyIDs (781).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlPartySubIDType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of sub-identifier** for the settlement party.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSettlPartyIDs (781).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DlvyInstType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of delivery instruction** being provided (e.g., settlement instructions, standing instructions).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Settlement Instruction messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TerminationType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **termination period** for the transaction (e.g., T+1, T+2).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in trade messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NextExpectedMsgSeqNum
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **next expected incoming sequence number** of the counterparty, sent in the Logon (MsgType='A') message. Used to initialize and verify the session state at login.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Key Note:** This is the sequence number the sender of the Logon message *expects to receive next* from the Logon recipient. It is critical for session synchronization.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrdStatusReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for an Order Status Request (MsgType='H') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for order status requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlInstReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Settlement Instruction Request (MsgType='v') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for settlement instruction requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettlInstReqRejCode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for rejecting a Settlement Instruction Request (MsgType='v').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Settlement Instruction Request Status (MsgType='v').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryAllocID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary identifier** for an Allocation Instruction (AllocID, 70).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Complements AllocID (70).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocReportType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of allocation report** (e.g., Preliminary, Ready to Book, Warehouse).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Report (MsgType='AS').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocReportRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **AllocReportID (755)** of a prior Allocation Report being referenced (e.g., for replacement or cancellation).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Report (MsgType='AS').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocCancReplaceReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **coded reason** for canceling or replacing an Allocation Report.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Allocation Report (MsgType='AS').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CopyMsgIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator, when 'Y', specifies that the message is a **copy** of a message already sent to another party.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Copy) or 'N' (Original).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocAccountType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of account** for which the allocation is intended (e.g., House, Customer).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the NoAllocs (78) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderAvgPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **average price of the order** from the perspective of a mass status report, used when reporting aggregated order data.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Order Mass Status Report (MsgType='r').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderBookingQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity of the order** that is available for post-trade booking, excluding canceled or held quantities.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Report (MsgType='8').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoSettlPartySubIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of settlement party sub-identifiers** included in the message. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Settlement Instruction messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoPartySubIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of party sub-identifiers** included for a specific PartyID (448). Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Party repeating group (NoPartyIDs, 453).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PartySubIDType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of sub-identifier** for the PartySubID (523) (e.g., Contact Name, Phone Number).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Party repeating group (NoPartyIDs, 453).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoNestedPartySubIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of nested party sub-identifiers** at the first nested level.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in nested Party repeating group (NoNestedPartyIDs, 539).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NestedPartySubIDType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type or nature of the Nested Party Sub ID (545)**, providing context for the identifier. This clarifies the kind of sub-entity being referenced, such as an internal desk or an operational unit.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used within the Nested Party block (539) to define the role of a sub-identifier (e.g., '3' for Clearing Account, '5' for Location ID).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoNested2PartySubIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of Repeating Group instances** for the Nested 2 Party Sub IDs. This field begins the innermost level of party sub-identification within a complex nested structure.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the innermost party structure when multi-level party identification is necessary (e.g., for clearing instructions related to a position on an underlying leg).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested2PartySubIDType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type or nature of the Nested 2 Party Sub ID (760)**, defining the role of the innermost sub-identifier.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in conjunction with Nested2PartySubID (760). Must be specified for the Nested2PartyID (757) to be correctly interpreted.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocIntermedReqType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates the **type of intermediary involvement requested** for an allocation transaction. This specifies the desired processing flow through intermediate parties.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Submission of Allocation to an Intermediary) or '2' (Request for 'Pre-matching' or Standing Instructions from Intermediary).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price of the underlying security** in a derivative transaction. Used to provide context for the pricing of the derivative itself, especially for complex structures.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: A decimal quantity. Important for verifying price relationships between the derivative and its underlying asset.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PriceDelta
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price differential** between a derivative and its underlying security, or between two related contracts. Often used in complex pricing models or relative value strategies.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: A decimal quantity. Represents the change in price per unit change of the underlying instrument.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ApplQueueMax
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **maximum depth** that the application-level queue is allowed to reach. If this limit is exceeded, the counterparty is expected to take action defined by ApplQueueAction (815).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Application Message Request/Report (MsgType='BX'/'BQ') to set/report limits on the message queue.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ApplQueueDepth
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current number of messages** (queue depth) waiting to be processed by the receiving application. Provides feedback on message processing lag.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Application Message Report (MsgType='BM') to indicate current queue status.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ApplQueueResolution
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **action taken by the receiving application** to resolve a congested queue or a backlog of messages (e.g., resend, refresh).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Queue Flushed), '1' (Queue Still Backlogged), '2' (Queue Overflow).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ApplQueueAction
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **action requested of the counterparty** regarding their application queue state, such as halting message transmission or resetting the queue.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (No Action), '1' (Block Further Messages), '2' (Block & Purge Queue).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoAltMDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of alternative Market Data sources** available. This marks the beginning of a repeating group describing multiple feed sources for a security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to list multiple trading venues or information providers for a given instrument.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AltMDSourceID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier for an alternative Market Data source** or trading venue, used when primary market data is insufficient or unavailable.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAltMDSource (816). Should typically be a MIC (Market Identifier Code).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryTradeReportID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary unique identifier** assigned to the Trade Capture Report (571) by another party or system (e.g., a central matching system or regulatory reporting facility).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when multiple systems need to reference the same primary Trade Report (571).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AvgPxIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates whether the average price (AvgPx, 6) calculation is based on a **Cross Trade or a single order**. Important for calculating commissions and regulatory reporting.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (No average pricing), '1' (Average price for an execution), '2' (Average price for a cross order).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeLinkID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **linking identifier** used to connect multiple trades (TradeID, 1003) that are the result of a single complex order or strategy (e.g., an order list or spread execution).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Allows post-trade systems to reconstruct the complete transaction from multiple fills/reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderInputDevice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Identifies the **physical or logical device/method** used to input the order (e.g., algorithmic engine, trading screen, DMA terminal).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used primarily for audit and regulatory compliance to trace the origin of the order instruction.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingTradingSessionID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **trading session identifier** (TradingSessionID, 336) applicable to the underlying security of a derivative. Used when the derivative trades in a different session from its underlying.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in conjunction with UnderlyingTradingSessionSubID (823) to define the exact trading period of the underlying asset.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingTradingSessionSubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-session identifier** (TradingSessionSubID, 625) applicable to the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in conjunction with UnderlyingTradingSessionID (822).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeLegRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique reference identifier** assigned to a trade execution specifically related to a single leg (component) of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trade Capture Reports (MsgType='AE') for complex instrument executions where each leg must be individually reported.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExchangeRule
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **specific rule or instruction code mandated by an exchange** or trading venue that must be applied to the order or trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for regulatory reasons or to enforce specific market microstructure rules.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeAllocIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates whether the trade is ready for, or has been subjected to, **allocation processing**. Used to signal readiness for the post-trade workflow.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Trade not yet allocated), '1' (Trade is ready for allocation), '2' (Trade has been allocated).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExpirationCycle
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Indicates the **frequency or timing pattern of expiration** for a derivative contract (e.g., quarterly, serial months, weekly).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages. Values include '0' (Expiration at end of day), '1' (Expiration at end of month).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TrdType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **classification of the trade transaction** (e.g., Regular Trade, Block Trade, EFP). Used for venue and regulatory reporting.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Regular Trade), '1' (Block Trade), '6' (Exchange for Physical - EFP). Mandatory in Trade Capture Reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TrdSubType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **further subdivision of the Trade Type (828)**, providing more granular detail on the nature of the transaction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Allows for proprietary or regulatory distinctions within broad TrdType categories.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TransferReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **reason for a Position Transfer**, typically used in Position Maintenance Request/Report messages (MsgType='AL', 'AM').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Corporate Action), '2' (Strategy Change), '3' (Broker Transfer).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AsgnReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for an Assignment Report Request (MsgType='AS') or Position Maintenance Request. Used to track the request for assignment details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for assignment request messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotNumAssignmentReports
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of Assignment Reports (833) expected** to be transmitted in a sequence, used for fragmentation management.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the header of multi-part Assignment Reports to indicate the total number of parts.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AsgnRptID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for an Assignment Report (MsgType='AW'). Used to report the results of an option assignment process.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for assignment reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ThresholdAmount
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **monetary value or quantity limit** related to regulatory thresholds, exposure limits, or pre-trade risk checks.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in position and risk management messages to communicate limits.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegMoveType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies how the **peg calculation adjusts** its reference price. This determines the dynamics of the pegged order as the market moves.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (No-Force the original PegOffsetValue), '1' (Floating - readjust offset), '2' (Fixed - reference price is fixed once triggered).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegOffsetType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies whether the offset (PegOffsetValue, 211) from the peg reference price is an **absolute value or a percentage**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Price/Absolute), '1' (Basis Points), '2' (Percentage).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegLimitType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Defines the **price boundaries** (limits) within which the calculated peg price can float.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (No limit), '1' (Do not exceed a limit price), '2' (Must be strictly better than limit price).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegRoundDirection
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies how the **calculated pegged price should be rounded** to fit the minimum price variation (tick size).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (To nearest tick), '2' (To next lower tick), '3' (To next higher tick).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PeggedPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **resulting calculated price** of a pegged order after applying all rules, offsets, and rounding instructions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The actual price (44) sent to the market. Decimal quantity.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegScope
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scope of the reference price** used for the peg calculation (e.g., the best price globally, or only the price from a specific venue).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (National/Global Best Price), '2' (Local/Venue-Specific Best Price).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DiscretionMoveType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies how the **discretionary offset (389) moves** relative to the original limit price (44).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (No-Force original DiscretionOffsetValue), '1' (Floating-adjust offset), '2' (Fixed-offset fixed once triggered).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DiscretionOffsetType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies whether the discretionary offset (389) is an **absolute value or a percentage**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Price/Absolute), '1' (Basis Points), '2' (Percentage).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DiscretionLimitType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Defines the **price boundaries** (limits) within which the calculated discretionary price can be executed.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values relate to whether the discretion can exceed the original limit price or must be limited by a calculated price.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DiscretionRoundDirection
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies how the **calculated discretionary price should be rounded** to fit the minimum price variation (tick size).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (To nearest tick), '2' (To next lower tick), '3' (To next higher tick).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DiscretionPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **resulting calculated price** that represents the maximum/minimum executable price when discretionary instructions are invoked.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. This is the calculated limit price when discretion is used, relative to the Price (44) field.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DiscretionScope
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scope of the reference price** used for the discretionary calculation (e.g., the best price globally, or only the price from a specific venue).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (National/Global Best Price), '2' (Local/Venue-Specific Best Price).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TargetStrategy
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **algorithmic trading strategy** (e.g., VWAP, TWAP, POV) that the order is intended to utilize. This is key for communicating the client's execution intention.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are coded (e.g., '1' for VWAP, '2' for TWAP) or proprietary strings. Mandatory for execution algorithms.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TargetStrategyParameters
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **string containing all specific configuration parameters** required by the TargetStrategy (847) (e.g., start time, end time, participation rate).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Free-text field for passing proprietary or non-standard algorithm parameters.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ParticipationRate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The desired **participation rate (as a percentage)** for a volume-based algorithm (e.g., POV - Percent of Volume).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Represents the percentage of the total market volume the order aims to capture.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TargetStrategyPerformance
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A measure of the **performance metric achieved** by the TargetStrategy (847), reported back to the client.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports or Algorithm Status Messages to indicate trade quality (e.g., slippage vs. benchmark).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PublishTrdIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator specifying whether the trade **should be published** (made visible) to the tape or market data feed.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Critical for over-the-counter (OTC) or off-exchange trades where transparency rules apply.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ShortSaleReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **reason or context** under which a short sale was executed, typically used to determine if an exemption to the short sale rule applies.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are coded based on regulatory requirements (e.g., '0' for Dealer/Market Maker, '1' for Exempt).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QtyType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of quantity or reference** used when specifying an order quantity (e.g., Shares, Contracts, Notional Value).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Shares), '1' (Contracts), '2' (Units). Used in messages like IOI or Quote Request.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryTrdType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary classification** of the trade transaction, allowing for dual categorization or specific regulatory labeling.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trade Capture Reports when a single TrdType (828) is insufficient.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeReportType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **purpose of the Trade Capture Report** (MsgType='AE'), indicating if it's a submission, a modification, an allegement, or a request for a match.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Submit), '3' (Alleged), '4' (Pending New). Mandatory in Trade Capture Reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocNoOrdersType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Defines the **context of an allocation** when the number of orders (NoOrders, 73) is zero. This indicates an allocation against a block trade, fund, or master account, not specific individual orders.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Not a block trade), '1' (Block Trade - Allocation is against a single block execution).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SharedCommission
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **amount of commission being shared** or split between parties, typically reported alongside the main Commission (12) amount.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in allocation or commission messages to detail fee splits.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ConfirmReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Confirmation Request (MsgType='BH') message. Used to request a formal confirmation for a trade or set of allocations.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for confirmation requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AvgParPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **average Par Price** (face value) of all fills for a debt instrument. Used for calculating the net value of fixed-income trades.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Execution Reports for fixed income securities.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ReportedPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **price reported manually or externally**, often used when the exchange price (LastPx, 31) needs verification or is being overridden.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in trade reporting when distinguishing between an automatically generated price and a declared price is necessary.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoCapacities
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of different trading capacities** (OrderCapacity, 528) represented in a trade. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for capacity breakdown.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to break down the OrderQty (38) into quantities traded under different capacities (e.g., Agency vs. Principal).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderCapacityQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity (shares/contracts)** associated with a specific OrderCapacity (528). The sum of all quantities in this repeating group should equal the total executed quantity.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoCapacities (862).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoEvents
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of key events** (EventType, 865) relevant to the security being reported. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for event dates and details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages (MsgType='d') to list events like dividend payment dates, call dates, etc.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EventType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of corporate or instrument event** that is being reported (e.g., Dividend, Coupon Payment, Redemption, Tender Offer).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoEvents (864).
