FIX_Tags_Description.name: EventDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date** associated with the EventType (865) (e.g., the ex-date for a dividend, or the call date for a bond).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used in the repeating group defined by NoEvents (864).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EventPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price** associated with the EventType (865) (e.g., a redemption price, or a public offering price).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoEvents (864).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EventText
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **free-form text description** providing additional details about the EventType (865).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoEvents (864).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PctAtRisk
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **percentage of the total value considered to be 'at risk'** for regulatory or internal risk calculation purposes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in position and risk management messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoInstrAttrib
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of additional attributes** that further describe the security instrument. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for custom characteristics.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages (MsgType='d') for technical or product-specific details.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrAttribType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of instrument attribute** being specified (e.g., Unit of Measure, Exchange Rate, Trading Status).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoInstrAttrib (870).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrAttribValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **value** associated with the specific InstrAttribType (871) (e.g., 'USD' if the type is currency, or '100' if the type is ParValue).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoInstrAttrib (870).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DatedDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **effective date** from which accrued interest calculation begins for a new debt instrument issue.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used primarily for fixed income securities, typically matching InterestAccrualDate (874).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InterestAccrualDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date** from which interest on a security begins to accumulate, for purposes of calculating accrued interest.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used in security definition messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CPProgram
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The type of **Commercial Paper (CP) program** associated with the security (e.g., 10b-5, 3(a)3).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for short-term debt instruments, typically coded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CPRegType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **registration type** associated with the Commercial Paper (CP) program (e.g., Registered, Unregistered).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for short-term debt instruments.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCPProgram
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The type of **Commercial Paper (CP) program** associated with the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCPRegType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **registration type** associated with the Commercial Paper (CP) program of the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity (shares/contracts)** of the underlying security related to the derivative. Used when the underlying quantity needs to be explicitly stated.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TrdMatchID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** assigned by the central matching authority or matching system for a successfully matched trade (two sides linked).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Distinguishes the matched trade from the individual trade reports (TradeReportID, 571). Mandatory after matching is complete.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryTradeReportRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary reference ID** to a previous Trade Capture Report (571) that the current report is canceling or replacing.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when multiple links to previous reports are maintained.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingDirtyPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price of the underlying security including accrued interest** (i.e., the dirty price).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingEndPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **end price** of the underlying security, typically used in collateral or margin calculations over a time period.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Collateral Inquiry/Report messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingStartValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **start value** of the underlying security, typically used in collateral or margin calculations over a time period.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Collateral Inquiry/Report messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCurrentValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current value** of the underlying security, typically used in collateral or margin calculations.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Collateral Inquiry/Report messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingEndValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **end value** of the underlying security, typically used in collateral or margin calculations over a time period.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Collateral Inquiry/Report messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoUnderlyingStips
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of stipulations (conditions)** for the underlying security. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for underlying security characteristics.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingStipType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of stipulation** (e.g., Maturity, Callable) for the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyingStips (887).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingStipValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **value or description** associated with the UnderlyingStipType (888).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyingStips (887).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MaturityNetMoney
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **net monetary amount** expected at the maturity of the security, after all calculations (e.g., interest, fees).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used for fixed income and derivative instruments.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MiscFeeBasis
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **basis for calculating the miscellaneous fee** (MiscFeeAmt, 137) (e.g., Absolute, Per Unit, Percentage).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoMiscFees (136).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotNoAllocs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of allocations** contained in a sequence of Allocation Instruction/Report messages, used for fragmentation management.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the header of multi-part Allocation messages to indicate the total number of parts.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LastFragment
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', indicates that the current message is the **final fragment** of a multi-part message (e.g., a long Allocation Report).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used to manage large messages fragmented over multiple FIX messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollReqID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Collateral Request (MsgType='AZ') message. Used to request or challenge collateral balances.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for collateral request messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollAsgnReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **reason for sending a Collateral Assignment** message (MsgType='AC'), defining the business context (e.g., margin call, substitution).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Margin Call), '1' (Substitution), '2' (Collateral Change).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollInquiryQualifier
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **qualifier that restricts the scope** of a collateral inquiry (CollInquiryID, 909) (e.g., inquire only about margin excess, or open positions).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Collateral Inquiry (MsgType='AO') to narrow the search scope.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoTrades
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of trades** (TradeReportID, 571) that are relevant to the collateral instruction. Marks the beginning of a repeating group for trade references.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Collateral Assignment messages to link collateral instructions to specific trades.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MarginRatio
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **ratio of collateral required** versus the total exposure (e.g., 10% margin).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in collateral messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MarginExcess
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The amount of **collateral that exceeds the required margin**, indicating available capital for other trades.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in collateral reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotalNetValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total net monetary value** of all positions or collateralized assets in the report.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in collateral or position reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CashOutstanding
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The amount of **cash currently outstanding** (unsettled or due) for a position or account.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in collateral or position reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollAsgnID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Collateral Assignment (MsgType='AC') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for collateral assignment messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollAsgnTransType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of transaction** for the Collateral Assignment (MsgType='AC'), indicating whether it's new, a replacement, or a cancellation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (New), '1' (Replace), '2' (Cancel), '3' (Release).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollRespID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Collateral Response (MsgType='AZ') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for collateral response messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollAsgnRespType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of response** to a Collateral Assignment (MsgType='AC'), indicating its acceptance, rejection, or other status.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Acknowledged), '1' (Rejected), '2' (Request to return collateral).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollAsgnRejectReason
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **reason for rejecting** a Collateral Assignment (MsgType='AC').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when CollAsgnRespType (905) is '1' (Rejected).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollAsgnRefID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **CollAsgnID (902) of the original Collateral Assignment** that the current message (e.g., a replacement or cancellation) is referring to.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when CollAsgnTransType (903) is '1' (Replace) or '2' (Cancel).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollRptID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Collateral Report (MsgType='BA') message. Used to provide periodic or requested collateral status details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for collateral reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollInquiryID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Collateral Inquiry (MsgType='AO') message. Used to request information about current collateral balances or requirements.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for collateral inquiry messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current status of the collateral agreement** or margin requirement reported in a Collateral Report (MsgType='BA').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Accepted), '1' (Disputed), '2' (Margin Call Issued).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TotNumReports
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total number of individual reports** (e.g., Collateral Reports) expected in a fragmented sequence.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for managing large or multi-part reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LastRptRequested
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', signifies that the current message is the **final report requested** in a series.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used to signal the end of a multi-report response.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AgreementDesc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **text description of the master agreement** or contract governing the collateral arrangement (e.g., GMRA, ISDA).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in collateral messages to identify the legal framework.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AgreementID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for the specific master agreement or contract governing the collateral arrangement.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in collateral messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AgreementDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date the master agreement or contract** governing the collateral arrangement **was executed**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used in collateral messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StartDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **start date** for a specific time period or validity of an instruction/report.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used in collateral or position reports for defining the time window.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EndDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **end date** for a specific time period or validity of an instruction/report.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used in collateral or position reports for defining the time window.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AgreementCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency in which the collateral agreement amounts are denominated**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Uses standard ISO 4217 currency codes.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DeliveryType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of delivery** mechanism specified (e.g., DVP, FOP, Hold in Custody).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Free), '2' (Versus Payment).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EndAccruedInterestAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The amount of **accrued interest** calculated up to the EndDate (917).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in collateral reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StartCash
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **starting cash balance** or value for the period defined by StartDate (916).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in collateral reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EndCash
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **ending cash balance** or value for the period defined by EndDate (917).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in collateral reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UserRequestID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a User Request (MsgType='AD') message. Used to manage administrative requests such as password changes or user status checks.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for user request messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UserRequestType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of administrative request** being made in the User Request (MsgType='AD') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Logon/User Login), '2' (Logoff/User Logout), '3' (Change Password), '4' (Request User Status).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NewPassword
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **new password** being requested for the User Request (MsgType='AD') when the request type is a password change (924='3').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Should be securely handled and transmitted (e.g., using EncryptMethod, 98, or EncryptedNewPassword, 1404).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UserStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current status of a FIX user ID** (Username, 553), as reported in a User Response (MsgType='AF').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Logged In), '2' (Not Logged In), '5' (Password Expired).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UserStatusText
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **textual description** providing more detail about the UserStatus (926).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in User Response (MsgType='AF').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StatusValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **coded value** representing a generic status (e.g., for a network component).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Network Counterparty Status Request/Response messages (MsgType='CC'/'CD').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StatusText
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **free-form text description** providing more detail about the StatusValue (928).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Network Counterparty Status Request/Response messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefCompID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **CompID (49) of the counterparty or network node being referenced** in a Network Counterparty Status Request/Response.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoCompIDs (936).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefSubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **SubID (50) of the counterparty or network node being referenced**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoCompIDs (936).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NetworkResponseID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Network Counterparty Status Response (MsgType='CD') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for network status responses.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NetworkRequestID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Network Counterparty Status Request (MsgType='CC') message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for network status requests.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LastNetworkResponseID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **NetworkResponseID (932) of the last response** received from the counterparty, used for continuity checks.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Network Counterparty Status Request/Response messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NetworkRequestType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of request** being made in the Network Counterparty Status Request (MsgType='CC').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Snapshot), '2' (Subscribe), '4' (Unsubscribe).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoCompIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of CompID/SubID pairs** being included in the message (e.g., the number of counterparties whose status is requested/reported).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of the repeating group for network node identification.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NetworkStatusResponseType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scope of the response** in the Network Counterparty Status Response (MsgType='CD').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Full Update), '2' (Incremental Update), '3' (Re-request).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoCollInquiryQualifier
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of inquiry qualifiers (896) sent** in a Collateral Inquiry (MsgType='AO').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of the repeating group for collateral inquiry filters.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TrdRptStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **processing status of a Trade Capture Report (571)** at the receiving side (e.g., accepted, rejected, matched).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Accepted), '1' (Rejected), '2' (Pending New).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AffirmStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **affirmation status** of a trade (e.g., affirmed, uncompared).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Affirmed), '1' (Uncompared), '2' (Affirmed with warning).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingStrikeCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency of the strike price** for the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Uses standard ISO 4217 currency codes. Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegStrikeCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency of the strike price** for a multi-leg security component.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Uses standard ISO 4217 currency codes. Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TimeBracket
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **time period or range** associated with a price or volume (e.g., used to define the window for a VWAP calculation).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Typically formatted as a time range (HH:MM-HH:MM).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollAction
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **action taken on the collateral** (e.g., a margin call was issued, or collateral was returned).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Margin Call Issued), '1' (Collateral Substitution).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollInquiryStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status of the Collateral Inquiry (909)**, indicating the processing result of the request.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Accepted), '1' (Rejected), '3' (Completed).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollInquiryResult
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **detailed result or output** of the Collateral Inquiry (909), providing the specific reason for failure or the nature of the report.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to describe the outcome of the inquiry request.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StrikeCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency in which the option's strike price (202) is denominated**. This is essential when the underlying asset trades in a different currency.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Uses standard ISO 4217 currency codes. Required for options where StrikePrice is not in the primary Currency (15).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoNested3PartyIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of Repeating Group instances** for the Nested 3 Party IDs. This field marks the deepest level of party identification nesting.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in complex financial messages requiring granular party breakdown.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested3PartyID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier** for the party at the third level of nesting.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested3PartyIDs (948).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested3PartyIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to define the Nested3PartyID (949).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested3PartyIDs (948).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested3PartyRole
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **function or responsibility** of the party at the third level of nesting.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested3PartyIDs (948).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoNested3PartySubIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of Repeating Group instances** for the Nested 3 Party Sub IDs.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the innermost party structure when multi-level sub-identification is necessary.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested3PartySubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **sub-identifier** for the party at the third level of nesting.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested3PartySubIDs (952).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: Nested3PartySubIDType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type or nature** of the Nested 3 Party Sub ID (953).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoNested3PartySubIDs (952).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegContractSettlMonth
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **contract month and year for settlement** of a leg (component) of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMM** or **YYYYMMDD**. Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegInterestAccrualDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date from which interest starts accumulating** for a leg (component) of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoStrategyParameters
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of custom parameters** used to configure an algorithmic trading strategy (TargetStrategy, 847).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of a repeating group for named strategy parameters.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StrategyParameterName
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **human-readable name** of a parameter used by the algorithmic trading strategy (e.g., 'EndTime', 'BenchmarkIndex').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoStrategyParameters (957).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StrategyParameterType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **data type** of the associated StrategyParameterValue (960) (e.g., Integer, String, Time).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoStrategyParameters (957).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StrategyParameterValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **value assigned to the StrategyParameterName (958)** (e.g., '14:30:00' if the name is 'EndTime').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoStrategyParameters (957).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: HostCrossID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier for a Cross Order (MsgType='s') assigned by the executing venue** (host system).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Similar to OrderID (37) but specific to a cross trade.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideTimeInForce
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **TimeInForce (59) specifically applied to one side** (buy or sell) of a cross trade or multi-sided order.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Allows different sides of a cross to have different TimeInForce characteristics.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDReportID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Market Data Report (MsgType='DM'). Used for administrative updates related to market data subscriptions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for operational updates on market data streams.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityReportID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Security Definition Update/Report (MsgType='BK'/'BP'). Used for reporting updates to instrument details.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for security update reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status of the security** (e.g., Active, Expired, Suspended) as reported by the market.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition Update/Report messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SettleOnOpenFlag
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', signifies that the **security settles based on the opening price**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages, typically for derivatives.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StrikeMultiplier
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A multiplier applied to the StrikePrice (202) to derive the effective price. Used for exotic derivatives.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Security Definition messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: StrikeValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **monetary value** associated with the StrikePrice (202) after applying the StrikeMultiplier (967).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Security Definition messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MinPriceIncrement
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **smallest allowable price variation** (tick size) for the security on the given venue.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Essential for price validation and exchange order logic.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PositionLimit
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **maximum number of contracts/shares** allowed to be held for a gross (long or short) position.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages for defining regulatory or exchange limits.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NTPositionLimit
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **maximum number of contracts/shares** allowed to be held for a net total (long minus short) position.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages for defining regulatory or exchange limits.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingAllocationPercent
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **percentage of the underlying asset** that is allocated to this component/leg of the trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCashAmount
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **cash amount** associated with the underlying security for settlement or calculation purposes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCashType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of cash amount (973)** (e.g., Fixed, Floating) for the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSettlementType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement mechanism** for the underlying security (e.g., Physical, Cash Settled).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: QuantityDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **date to which a reported quantity (QtyType, 854) pertains** (e.g., the date of a position quantity).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used to provide context for quantity reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ContIntRptID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Confirmation of Interest Report (MsgType='BN'). Used for indicating confirmed interest in a security (often unsolicited).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The primary identifier for Confirmation of Interest reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LateIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', indicates the **message or report is being sent after the required deadline**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used for regulatory and internal audit purposes.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InputSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **system or interface** that originally created and submitted the order or report (e.g., FIX, API, Manual).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for tracing the order/report flow.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecurityUpdateAction
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of action requested** on a security definition (e.g., New, Delete, Modify).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include 'A' (Add), 'D' (Delete), 'M' (Modify). Used in Security Definition Update messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoExpiration
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of repeating expiration groups** included in the message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages for defining complex or multi-step expirations.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExpType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of expiration event** (e.g., Option Exercise, Delivery Notice).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoExpiration (981).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExpQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity** associated with the expiration event (ExpType, 982).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoExpiration (981).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoUnderlyingAmounts
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of different monetary amounts** associated with the underlying security. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingPayAmount
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **amount of money required to be paid** (or transferred) for the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyingAmounts (984).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCollectAmount
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **amount of money required to be collected** (or received) for the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyingAmounts (984).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSettlementDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement date** for the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSettlementStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement status** of the underlying security (e.g., Pending, Settled).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryIndividualAllocID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary unique identifier** assigned to a single allocation entry (IndividualAllocID, 467).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAllocs (78).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegReportID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** for a Leg Trade Report (part of Trade Capture Report). Used to reference the reporting of a single component trade in a multi-leg transaction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RndPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **rounded price** value, used when the calculated price must adhere to specific rounding conventions.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used for certain fixed income instruments.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: IndividualAllocType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of individual allocation** (e.g., Give-up Trade, Full Allocation, Partial Allocation).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAllocs (78).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocCustomerCapacity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **customer's capacity** as required by regulatory authorities for this specific allocation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAllocs (78). Similar to CustOrderCapacity (582).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TierCode
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **code designating a pricing or regulatory tier** applicable to the order or trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for specific regulatory requirements or pricing schemes.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnitofMeasure
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **physical unit** used to express the quantities (e.g., OrderQty, 38) for the security (e.g., shares, contracts, barrels, cubic meters).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are coded (e.g., 'SHA' for Shares, 'MMBtu' for energy products). Crucial for commodities and non-standard instruments.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TimeUnit
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **unit of time** used to define the expiration or life of the security (e.g., Year, Month, Day).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingUnitofMeasure
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **physical unit of measure** used for the quantity of the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegUnitofMeasure
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **physical unit of measure** used for the quantity of a leg (component) of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingTimeUnit
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **unit of time** used to define the expiration or life of the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegTimeUnit
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **unit of time** used to define the expiration or life of a leg (component).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method used to divide the executed quantity** among the allocated accounts (e.g., Arbitrary, Random, Pro-Rata).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Automatic), '2' (Manual), '3' (Pre-allocated).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **unique identifier** assigned to a single trade by the executing firm. Used to identify the actual execution event at the firm level.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Often used in Trade Capture Reports (MsgType='AE') and contrasts with the execution-specific ExecID (17).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideTradeReportID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **Trade Report ID (571) specific to one side** (buy or sell) of a trade. Used when the two sides of a trade are reported independently.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideFillStationCd
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **Fill Station or Location Code** where the execution for one side of the trade occurred.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideReasonCd
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reason code** specific to one side (buy or sell) of a trade (e.g., to indicate an error or specific condition).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideTrdSubTyp
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **trade sub-type (829) specific to one side** (buy or sell) of a trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity** executed for one side (buy or sell) of the trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MessageEventSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **source identifier** of the system or application that generated the message, providing higher granularity than SenderCompID (49).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for internal routing or audit trail within large financial institutions.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideTrdRegTimestamp
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **trade registration timestamp (769) specific to one side** of a trade (e.g., the time the buyer's side was reported to a regulatory body).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: UTC** (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss). Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideTrdRegTimestampType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of trade registration timestamp (770) specific to one side** of a trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideTrdRegTimestampSrc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **source of the trade registration timestamp (771) specific to one side** of a trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AsOfIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', indicates the **report is being transmitted 'as of'** a specific historical date/time, rather than the current time.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used for backdated or corrected reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoSideTrdRegTS
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of trade registration timestamps** included for a specific side (buy or sell) of a trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of a repeating group within the Side (54) repeating group.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegOptionRatio
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **option ratio** (multiplier) specifically for a leg (component) of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoInstrumentParties
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of parties whose roles are directly related to the instrument** itself (e.g., warrant agent, guarantor, trustee).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of a repeating group within the Instrument block (SecurityID, 48).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrumentPartyID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier of the party** whose role is directly related to the instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoInstrumentParties (1018).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeVolume
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **total volume of trades** for a security, typically reported in a Market Data message (MsgType='W' or 'X').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used as a Market Data Entry Type (269='B') for aggregate volume.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDBookType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of order book** being referenced or requested (e.g., Price Level, Order Level).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Top of Book), '2' (Price Level), '3' (Order Level).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDFeedType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **classification of the market data feed** (e.g., Live, Delayed, Composite).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data Request (MsgType='V').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDPriceLevel
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **specific price level or depth** of the book being reported in a Market Data Incremental Refresh.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to denote the rank of the price (e.g., 1st level, 2nd level BBO).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDOriginType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **origin or source of the market data** (e.g., Primary Market, Contributed).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Market Data messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: FirstPx
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **first trade price** of the day for a security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Market Data Snapshot (MsgType='W').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntrySpotRate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **Foreign Exchange (FX) spot rate** associated with the Market Data Entry (e.g., a foreign currency trade).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used when MDEntryType (269) involves a currency component.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDEntryForwardPoints
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **FX forward points** associated with the Market Data Entry.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used when MDEntryType (269) involves a currency component.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ManualOrderIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', indicates the **order was entered by human intervention** (manual).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used for regulatory reporting to differentiate manual vs. automated orders.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CustDirectedOrder
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', indicates the **order was directed to a specific venue/destination by the customer**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used for best execution and regulatory requirements.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ReceivedDeptID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **department identifier** within the broker/firm that initially received the order or instruction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for internal audit and routing.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CustOrderHandlingInst
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specific **instructions for handling the customer order** (e.g., Do Not Route, Prefer Internal Match).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for detailed customer preference handling.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderHandlingInstSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **source** (e.g., Manual Input, Algorithmic System) of the CustOrderHandlingInst (1031).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for audit purposes.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DeskType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of trading desk** responsible for handling the order (e.g., Equity Desk, Derivative Desk).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for internal management and routing.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DeskTypeSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **source** (e.g., Internal Code, Regulatory Standard) of the DeskType (1033).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for internal management and routing.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DeskOrderHandlingInst
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specific **instructions for how the trading desk should handle the order** (e.g., Immediate Execution, Hold to Close).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for internal risk and desk-level workflow management.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExecAckStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **status of the execution acknowledgment** for a Trade Capture Report (MsgType='AE').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Accepted), '1' (Rejected), '2' (Pending).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingDeliveryAmount
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **amount of the underlying security** to be delivered upon exercise or settlement.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingCapValue
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **capital value** of the underlying security, often used for net exposure calculation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingSettlMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **settlement method** for the underlying security (e.g., Physical or Cash).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryTradeID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary unique identifier** for the trade (TradeID, 1003) assigned by another party or system.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for cross-referencing between different post-trade systems.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: FirmTradeID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **Trade ID (1003) assigned internally by the executing firm**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Provides the highest-level internal trade reference.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryFirmTradeID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary internal Trade ID** assigned by the executing firm.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for cross-referencing within the firm's systems.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CollApplType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **application type** of the collateral instruction (e.g., used for margin, or for general collateral agreement).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Collateral Assignment (MsgType='AC').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingAdjustedQuantity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity of the underlying security adjusted** due to corporate actions or other changes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingFXRate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **Foreign Exchange (FX) rate** used to convert the currency of the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UnderlyingFXRateCalc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method of FX rate calculation** (Multiply or Divide) for the underlying security.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'M' (Multiply) or 'D' (Divide). Used in the repeating group defined by NoUnderlyings (711).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocPositionEffect
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **PositionEffect (77) specific to an allocation entry** (e.g., Open, Close).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAllocs (78).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DealingCapacity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **capacity in which the executing firm is acting** for the order (e.g., Agency, Principal, Prop).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Agency), '2' (Principal), '3' (Proprietary). Used for trade reporting.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrmtAssignmentMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method for assigning options/futures contracts** (e.g., Random, Pro-Rata).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Security Definition messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrumentPartyIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to define the InstrumentPartyID (1019).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoInstrumentParties (1018).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrumentPartyRole
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **function or responsibility** of the party whose role is directly related to the instrument (e.g., Guarantor, Trustee).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoInstrumentParties (1018).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoInstrumentPartySubIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of sub-identifiers** for the Instrument Party.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of a repeating group within the Instrument Party block.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrumentPartySubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **sub-identifier** for the party whose role is directly related to the instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoInstrumentPartySubIDs (1052).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: InstrumentPartySubIDType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type or nature** of the InstrumentPartySubID (1053).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoInstrumentPartySubIDs (1052).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PositionCurrency
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **currency in which the position balance is valued**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Uses standard ISO 4217 currency codes. Used in Position Reports (MsgType='AO').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CalculatedCcyLastQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity of the last fill (32) calculated and expressed in the trade currency (15)**, which may differ from the position currency.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Execution Reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoUndlyInstrumentParties
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of parties whose roles are directly related to the underlying instrument**.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of a repeating group within the Underlying Instrument block.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UndlyInstrumentPartyID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier of the party** whose role is directly related to the underlying instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUndlyInstrumentParties (1058).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UndlyInstrumentPartyIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to define the UndlyInstrumentPartyID (1059).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUndlyInstrumentParties (1058).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UndlyInstrumentPartyRole
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **function or responsibility** of the party whose role is directly related to the underlying instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUndlyInstrumentParties (1058).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoUndlyInstrumentPartySubIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of sub-identifiers** for the Underlying Instrument Party.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of a repeating group within the Underlying Instrument Party block.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UndlyInstrumentPartySubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **sub-identifier** for the party whose role is directly related to the underlying instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUndlyInstrumentPartySubIDs (1062).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: UndlyInstrumentPartySubIDType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type or nature** of the UndlyInstrumentPartySubID (1063).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoUndlyInstrumentPartySubIDs (1062).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: BidSwapPoints
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **swap points** (difference between spot and forward price) for the bid side in a Foreign Exchange (FX) quote.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Quote messages (MsgType='S').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OfferSwapPoints
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **swap points** for the offer side in a Foreign Exchange (FX) quote.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Quote messages (MsgType='S').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegBidForwardPoints
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **forward points** for the bid side of a leg (component) in a multi-leg FX trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegOfferForwardPoints
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **forward points** for the offer side of a leg (component) in a multi-leg FX trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SwapPoints
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **swap points** (difference between spot and forward price) for a trade or position.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Execution Reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MDQuoteType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of quote** represented in the market data entry (e.g., Tradeable, Indicative, Restricted).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '0' (Tradeable), '1' (Indicative). Used in Market Data messages.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LastSwapPoints
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **swap points** at which the last FX trade was executed.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Execution Reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SideGrossTradeAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **gross monetary value** (price * quantity) for one side (buy or sell) of a trade.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoSides (552).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegLastForwardPoints
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **forward points** at which the last fill for a leg was executed.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegCalculatedCcyLastQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity of the last fill for a leg (component) expressed in the trade currency (15)**, which may differ from the position currency.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LegGrossTradeAmt
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **gross monetary value** (price * quantity) for a leg (component) of a multi-leg instrument.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in the repeating group defined by NoLegs (555).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MaturityTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **time of day** when a security or contract (defined by MaturityDate, 541) officially expires or matures.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: UTC** (HH:MM:SS.sss or HH:MM). Used to precisely define expiration, typically for derivatives.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefOrderID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **OrderID (37) of a related order**, used for cross-referencing between separate but related orders/messages.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to link a parent order to child orders, or related solicitations.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefOrderIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **source or context** for the RefOrderID (1080) (e.g., Primary Exchange, Internal OMS).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to clarify the domain of the reference ID.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SecondaryDisplayQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **secondary quantity to display** for an order, typically used for complex display strategies.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for advanced iceberg order types.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DisplayWhen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **condition under which an order should be made visible** (displayed) to the market (e.g., when market conditions are met).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for conditional order types.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DisplayMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **method or algorithm used to display** the order quantity (e.g., Randomly, Fixed Increments).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for advanced iceberg order types.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DisplayLowQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **minimum quantity** to be displayed as part of an order's reserve (iceberg) quantity.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for dynamic iceberg order types.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DisplayHighQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **maximum quantity** to be displayed as part of an order's reserve (iceberg) quantity.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for dynamic iceberg order types.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DisplayMinIncr
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **minimum increment** by which the displayed quantity can be changed during the order's lifetime.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for dynamic iceberg order types.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefreshQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity to be displayed when the currently displayed quantity (1138) is depleted** (i.e., the refill size of the iceberg).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for iceberg orders.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MatchIncrement
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **minimum quantity increment** required for a match/execution against this order.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for specific venue matching rules.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: MaxPriceLevels
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **maximum number of price levels** on the order book the order is allowed to interact with or check for quotes.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for dark pool or non-displayed orders to limit interaction.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PreTradeAnonymity
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', indicates the **order should remain anonymous** prior to execution.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used for dark orders.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PriceProtectionScope
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scope of the market data used for price protection** (e.g., the best price globally, or only the price from a specific venue).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to define the benchmark for price violation checks (e.g., Reg NMS checks).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: LotType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **classification of the quantity** being sent (e.g., Round Lot, Odd Lot, Block Lot).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for specific trading rules associated with lot sizes.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of price used as a reference** for the peg calculation (e.g., Last Trade, Midpoint, Primary Market Best Bid/Offer).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Last Trade), '2' (Midpoint), '3' (Best Bid/Offer).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PeggedRefPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **explicit price value** used as the anchor for the peg calculation.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used when the reference price is not implied by PegPriceType (1094).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegSecurityIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to define the PegSecurityID (1097).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when pegging to an instrument different from the one being traded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegSecurityID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier of the security** used as the peg reference.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when pegging to an instrument different from the one being traded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegSymbol
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **ticker symbol** of the security used as the peg reference.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when pegging to an instrument different from the one being traded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: PegSecurityDesc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **text description** of the security used as the peg reference.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when pegging to an instrument different from the one being traded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **market event or condition** that activates a contingent order (e.g., a Stop, Contingency, or Trailing Stop).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Price), '2' (Volume), '7' (Liquidity Provision).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerAction
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **action to be taken** (e.g., submit a new order, cancel an existing order) when the TriggerType (1100) condition is met.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Activate Order), '2' (Cancel Order).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **price value** that, when reached, activates the contingent order or instruction.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Mandatory if TriggerType (1100) is 'Price'.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerSymbol
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **ticker symbol** of the security whose price/volume action triggers the order.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when the trigger is based on an instrument different from the one being traded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerSecurityID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier of the security** whose price/volume action triggers the order.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when the trigger is based on an instrument different from the one being traded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerSecurityIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to define the TriggerSecurityID (1104).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when the trigger is based on an instrument different from the one being traded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerSecurityDesc
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **text description** of the security whose price/volume action triggers the order.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when the trigger is based on an instrument different from the one being traded.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerPriceType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type of market price** used to check the TriggerPrice (1102) condition (e.g., Last Trade, Bid, Offer).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Last Trade), '2' (Bid), '3' (Offer).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerPriceTypeScope
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scope of the market price** used to check the TriggerPrice (1102) condition (e.g., Global Best Price, Local Venue Price).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for more precise control over the trigger condition.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerPriceDirection
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **direction of the price movement** required to activate the trigger (e.g., above, below, equal).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values include '1' (Above), '2' (Below).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerNewPrice
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **limit price (44)** of the new order that is submitted once the trigger condition is met.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used if TriggerAction (1101) is to activate a limit order.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerOrderType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **order type (40)** of the new order that is submitted once the trigger condition is met (e.g., Market, Limit).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used if TriggerAction (1101) is to activate a new order.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerNewQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity (38)** of the new order that is submitted once the trigger condition is met.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used if TriggerAction (1101) is to activate a new order.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerTradingSessionID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **TradingSessionID (336)** during which the trigger is active or monitored.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to limit the trigger's validity to a specific trading session.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TriggerTradingSessionSubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **TradingSessionSubID (625)** during which the trigger is active or monitored.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to limit the trigger's validity to a specific trading sub-session.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrderCategory
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **broad classification of the order** beyond the Instrument (e.g., Agency Trading, Proprietary Trading).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for internal risk and regulatory classification.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoRootPartyIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of Root Parties (1117)**, representing the ultimate, non-intermediated client or firm. Marks the beginning of a repeating group.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to define the final beneficial owner or decision maker, separate from the execution parties.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RootPartyID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **identifier of the Root Party**, the ultimate source or destination of the order.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoRootPartyIDs (1116).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RootPartyIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to define the RootPartyID (1117).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoRootPartyIDs (1116).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RootPartyRole
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **function or responsibility** of the Root Party (e.g., Ultimate Client, Fund Manager).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoRootPartyIDs (1116).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: NoRootPartySubIDs
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **number of sub-identifiers** for the Root Party.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Marks the beginning of a repeating group within the Root Party block.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RootPartySubID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **sub-identifier** for the Root Party.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoRootPartySubIDs (1120).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RootPartySubIDType
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **type or nature** of the RootPartySubID (1121).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoRootPartySubIDs (1120).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TradeHandlingInstr
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Instructions regarding **how a trade should be processed** post-execution (e.g., Auto-match, Bilateral Confirmation).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Trade Capture Reports (MsgType='AE').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrigTradeHandlingInstr
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **original instructions** regarding trade handling when a Trade Capture Report (571) is being canceled or replaced.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when TradeReportTransType (487) is 'Cancel' or 'Replace'.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrigTradeDate
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **original trade date (75)** when a trade is being reported 'as of' a different date.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: **Format: YYYYMMDD**. Used in Trade Capture Reports (MsgType='AE').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrigTradeID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **TradeID (1003) of the original trade** that is being canceled or replaced.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when TradeReportTransType (487) is 'Cancel' or 'Replace'.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: OrigSecondaryTradeID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **SecondaryTradeID (1040) of the original trade** that is being canceled or replaced.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used when TradeReportTransType (487) is 'Cancel' or 'Replace'.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ApplVerID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **version identifier for the FIX application message layer** being used (e.g., FIX.4.4, FIX.5.0). This defines the message structure and field validity.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory session header field in the FIXT.1.1 (Tag 8) transport layer. It separates the application protocol version from the transport version.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: CstmApplVerID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **custom or extension version identifier** that further specifies a firm-specific dialect or set of extensions applied to the base ApplVerID (1128).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used to support non-standard message definitions on a standard FIX version.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefApplVerID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reference to the ApplVerID (1128)** of a message being referenced (e.g., the message that caused an application-level failure).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Business Message Reject (MsgType='j') or Application Message Report.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefCstmApplVerID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reference to the CstmApplVerID (1129)** of a message being referenced.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Business Message Reject (MsgType='j') or Application Message Report.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: TZTransactTime
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **TransactTime (60) expressed with its specific time zone** to eliminate ambiguity regarding the time of the business event.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Format is **TZ (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss+HH:MM)** or **TZ (YYYYMMDD-HH:MM:SS.sss-HH:MM)** (e.g., 20230101-10:00:00.000+05:30).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExDestinationIDSource
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **scheme or authority** used to define the ExDestination (100) ID.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for regulatory reporting to specify the domain of the execution venue identifier.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ReportedPxDiff
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **difference in price** between the ReportedPx (861) and the actual execution price (LastPx, 31).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Decimal quantity. Used in Trade Capture Reports.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RptSys
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **system identifier** of the system submitting the trade report to a regulatory body or matching utility.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for regulatory reporting.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: AllocClearingFeeIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **clearing fee indicator (635)** specifically applied to an individual allocation entry.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in the repeating group defined by NoAllocs (78).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DefaultApplVerID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **default application version identifier (1128)** to be assumed for all application messages on the session unless explicitly overridden per message.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Logon (MsgType='A') under the FIXT.1.1 transport layer.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DisplayQty
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **quantity (shares/contracts) currently visible to the marketplace** for an iceberg or pegged order. This is the live displayed size.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Execution Reports (MsgType='8') to communicate the currently displayed portion of the order.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ExchangeSpecialInstructions
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **text field containing special, venue-specific instructions** for the order that do not fit into standard FIX tags.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for proprietary market access instructions.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: ApplExtID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: An **application extension identifier** for messages on the FIXT.1.1 layer that do not use a standard FIX application version (ApplVerID, 1128).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used for proprietary extensions at the transport level.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncryptedPasswordMethod
FIX_Tags_Description.description: Specifies the **encryption algorithm** used for the EncryptedPassword (1402) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values are coded (e.g., '0' for None, '1' for PKCS, '2' for DES).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncryptedPasswordLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the EncryptedPassword (1402) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncryptedPassword (1402) is present. Used in Logon (MsgType='A').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncryptedPassword
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **password** for the user (Username, 553) sent in an encrypted format. The length and method are specified by preceding tags.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Logon (MsgType='A'). Length is in EncryptedPasswordLen (1401).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncryptedNewPasswordLen
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **length in bytes** of the EncryptedNewPassword (1404) field.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Mandatory if EncryptedNewPassword (1404) is present. Used in User Request (MsgType='AD').

FIX_Tags_Description.name: EncryptedNewPassword
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **new password** for the user being sent in an encrypted format (as opposed to NewPassword, 925). Used in User Request (MsgType='AD').
FIX_Tags_Description.note: The encryption method must be specified via EncryptedPasswordMethod (1400).

FIX_Tags_Description.name: RefApplExtID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A **reference to the ApplExtID (1156)** of a message being referenced at the transport layer.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in application management messages for non-standard application versions.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DefaultApplExtID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **default application extension identifier (1156)** to be assumed for all messages on the session.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Logon (MsgType='A') under the FIXT.1.1 transport layer.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DefaultCstmApplVerID
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **default custom application version identifier (1129)** to be assumed for all messages on the session.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Logon (MsgType='A') under the FIXT.1.1 transport layer.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: SessionStatus
FIX_Tags_Description.description: The **current status of the FIX session** reported from the peer in the FIXT.1.1 layer (e.g., Up, Down, Session Active).
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Used in Session Status messages to report the state of the transport session.

FIX_Tags_Description.name: DefaultVerIndicator
FIX_Tags_Description.description: A boolean indicator that, when 'Y', signifies that the **default application version (1137)** should be assumed for all messages on the session.
FIX_Tags_Description.note: Values 'Y' (Yes) or 'N' (No). Used in Logon (MsgType='A') to confirm default version usage.
